<!doctype html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>NL Diagnóstica — Editais de Licitação</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
    <style>
      :root {
        /* Paleta da marca NL Diagnóstica (laranja institucional) */
        --bg: #f4f6f9;
        --panel: #ffffff;
        --card: #ffffff;
        --line: #e6eaf0;
        --txt: #1f2a37;
        --muted: #6b7785;
        --pri: #f7941e;
        --pri2: #e07c12;
        --pri-soft: #fff3e3;
        --brand1: #b85c0a;
        --brand2: #8f4205; /* gradiente da barra/marca (escuro p/ contraste) */
        --ok: #16a34a;
        --okbg: #e8f7ee;
        --no: #dc2626;
        --nobg: #fdeaea;
        --warn: #d97706;
        --chip: #f3f5f8;
        --shadow:
          0 1px 2px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.04), 0 4px 16px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.06);
        --sidebar-width: 248px;
      }
      * {
        box-sizing: border-box;
      }
      body {
        margin: 0;
        font-family:
          system-ui,
          Segoe UI,
          Roboto,
          Arial,
          sans-serif;
        background: var(--bg);
        color: var(--txt);
        font-size: 14px;
      }
      a {
        color: var(--pri2);
      }
      button {
        font-family: inherit;
        cursor: pointer;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 9px;
        padding: 8px 14px;
        font-weight: 600;
        transition:
          background 0.15s,
          color 0.15s,
          box-shadow 0.15s,
          transform 0.08s,
          filter 0.15s;
      }
      button:active {
        transform: translateY(1px);
      }
      button:disabled {
        opacity: 0.5;
        cursor: not-allowed;
        filter: grayscale(0.2);
        box-shadow: none;
      }
      button:disabled:active {
        transform: none;
      }
      button:focus-visible,
      input:focus-visible,
      select:focus-visible,
      textarea:focus-visible {
        outline: 2px solid var(--pri);
        outline-offset: 2px;
      }
      /* scrollbar discreta */
      * {
        scrollbar-width: thin;
        scrollbar-color: #c9d2dd transparent;
      }
      *::-webkit-scrollbar {
        width: 8px;
        height: 8px;
      }
      *::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
        background: #c9d2dd;
        border-radius: 999px;
      }
      *::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
        background: #aab6c5;
      }
      *::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
        background: transparent;
      }
      .btn-pri {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--pri), var(--pri2));
        color: #fff;
        box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(224, 124, 18, 0.35);
      }
      .btn-pri:hover {
        filter: brightness(1.06);
        box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(224, 124, 18, 0.32);
      }
      .btn-ok {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1fb955, var(--ok));
        color: #fff;
        box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(22, 163, 74, 0.3);
      }
      .btn-ok:hover {
        filter: brightness(1.05);
      }
      .btn-no {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ef4444, var(--no));
        color: #fff;
        box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.3);
      }
      .btn-no:hover {
        filter: brightness(1.05);
      }
      .btn-ghost {
        background: #fff;
        color: var(--txt);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
      }
      .btn-ghost:hover {
        background: var(--pri-soft);
        color: var(--pri2);
        border-color: var(--pri);
      }
      .btn-ghost:disabled {
        opacity: 0.45;
        cursor: not-allowed;
        background: #fff;
        color: var(--muted);
        border-color: var(--line);
      }
      input,
      select,
      textarea {
        background: #fff;
        color: var(--txt);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 8px;
        padding: 8px 10px;
        font-family: inherit;
        font-size: 14px;
        width: 100%;
      }
      input:focus,
      select:focus,
      textarea:focus {
        outline: none;
        border-color: var(--pri);
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--pri-soft);
      }
      .hidden {
        display: none !important;
      }
      /* marca / logo */
      .logo-mark {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 10px;
      }
      .logo-mark img {
        height: 34px;
        display: block;
      }
      .logo-mark .wm {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        line-height: 1;
      }
      .logo-mark .wm b {
        font-weight: 800;
        letter-spacing: 0.5px;
        font-size: 17px;
      }
      .logo-mark .wm small {
        font-size: 9.5px;
        letter-spacing: 2px;
        opacity: 0.85;
        text-transform: uppercase;
      }
      /* login */
      #login {
        min-height: 100vh;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff7ee 0%, #f4f6f9 55%);
      }
      .login-card {
        background: var(--card);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 16px;
        width: 380px;
        overflow: hidden;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow);
      }
      .login-head {
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--brand1), var(--brand2));
        padding: 26px 28px;
        color: #fff;
      }
      .login-head img {
        height: 46px;
        display: block;
        margin-bottom: 10px;
        filter: drop-shadow(0 1px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35));
      }
      .login-head h1 {
        font-size: 18px;
        margin: 0;
        font-weight: 700;
        text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
      }
      .login-head p {
        margin: 2px 0 0;
        font-size: 12.5px;
        opacity: 1;
        color: #ffe9d2;
      }
      .login-body {
        padding: 26px 28px;
      }
      .login-body label {
        display: block;
        margin: 12px 0 4px;
        color: var(--muted);
        font-size: 12px;
      }
      .err {
        color: #b91c1c;
        font-size: 13px;
        margin-top: 10px;
        min-height: 18px;
      }
      /* ===== app shell: topbar + sidebar (estilo Rubbercity) ===== */
      #app {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        height: 100vh;
        overflow: hidden;
      }
      .topbar {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 14px;
        padding: 0 18px;
        height: 60px;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--brand1), var(--brand2));
        color: #fff;
        z-index: 30;
        box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(243, 113, 33, 0.25);
        flex-shrink: 0;
      }
      .topbar .logo-mark .wm {
        color: #fff;
      }
      .topbar .right {
        margin-left: auto;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 12px;
      }
      .role-pill {
        font-size: 11px;
        padding: 4px 10px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
        color: #fff;
      }
      .status-pill {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        font-size: 11px;
        font-weight: 600;
        padding: 4px 10px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
        color: #fff;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }
      .status-pill .status-dot {
        width: 8px;
        height: 8px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #fff;
        flex-shrink: 0;
      }
      .status-pill.online .status-dot {
        background: #29d07a;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(41, 208, 122, 0.3);
      }
      .status-pill.offline .status-dot {
        background: #ff5a5a;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255, 90, 90, 0.3);
      }
      .status-pill.checking .status-dot {
        background: #ffd166;
        animation: statusPulse 1s ease-in-out infinite;
      }
      @keyframes statusPulse {
        0%,
        100% {
          opacity: 1;
        }
        50% {
          opacity: 0.35;
        }
      }
      .toggle-sidebar-btn {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
        color: #fff;
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        cursor: pointer;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        flex-shrink: 0;
        padding: 0;
      }
      .toggle-sidebar-btn:hover {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28);
      }
      .toggle-sidebar-btn svg {
        width: 18px;
        height: 18px;
      }

      .main-grid {
        display: grid;
        flex: 1;
        overflow: hidden;
        grid-template-columns: var(--sidebar-width) 1fr;
        transition: grid-template-columns 0.3s ease;
        position: relative;
      }
      .main-grid.sidebar-closed {
        grid-template-columns: 0 1fr;
      }

      #sidebar {
        background: var(--card);
        border-right: 2px solid var(--pri);
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        overflow: hidden;
      }
      #sidebar-header {
        padding: 16px 16px 12px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
      }
      #sidebar-header .sb-title {
        font-size: 11px;
        letter-spacing: 1.5px;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        color: var(--muted);
        font-weight: 700;
      }
      .sidebar-nav {
        flex: 1;
        overflow-y: auto;
        padding: 10px;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 4px;
      }
      .sidebar-nav button {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 11px;
        width: 100%;
        text-align: left;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        padding: 11px 12px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        background: transparent;
        color: var(--txt);
        font-weight: 600;
        font-size: 13.5px;
        border-left: 3px solid transparent;
      }
      .sidebar-nav button svg {
        width: 17px;
        height: 17px;
        color: var(--muted);
        flex-shrink: 0;
      }
      .sidebar-nav button:hover {
        background: var(--chip);
      }
      .sidebar-nav button.active {
        background: var(--pri-soft);
        color: var(--pri2);
        border-left-color: var(--pri);
      }
      .sidebar-nav button.active svg {
        color: var(--pri2);
      }

      .sidebar-footer {
        padding: 14px;
        border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
        background: #fafbfd;
        margin-top: auto;
      }
      .user-profile {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 11px;
        padding: 8px;
        background: var(--chip);
        border-radius: 8px;
      }
      .user-avatar {
        width: 36px;
        height: 36px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--brand1), var(--brand2));
        color: #fff;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 14px;
        flex-shrink: 0;
      }
      .user-info {
        flex: 1;
        overflow: hidden;
      }
      .user-name {
        font-size: 13px;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--txt);
        white-space: nowrap;
        overflow: hidden;
        text-overflow: ellipsis;
      }
      .user-role {
        font-size: 11px;
        color: var(--muted);
      }
      .footer-actions {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 8px;
        margin-top: 10px;
      }
      .footer-btn {
        flex: 1;
        padding: 9px;
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        background: #fff;
        color: var(--txt);
        border-radius: 7px;
        cursor: pointer;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 7px;
        font-size: 12.5px;
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      .footer-btn svg {
        width: 14px;
        height: 14px;
      }
      .footer-btn:hover {
        background: var(--pri-soft);
        color: var(--pri2);
        border-color: var(--pri);
      }

      #content {
        overflow: auto;
        padding: 22px 20px;
      }
      #content > section {
        max-width: 1400px;
        margin: 0 auto;
      }

      .sidebar-backdrop {
        display: none;
      }
      @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .main-grid {
          grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
        .main-grid.sidebar-closed {
          grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
        #sidebar {
          position: absolute;
          left: 0;
          top: 0;
          width: 260px;
          height: 100%;
          z-index: 200;
          box-shadow: 2px 0 12px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.25);
          transition: transform 0.3s ease;
          transform: translateX(-100%);
        }
        .main-grid:not(.sidebar-closed) #sidebar {
          transform: translateX(0);
        }
        .sidebar-backdrop {
          display: none;
          position: absolute;
          inset: 0;
          background: rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.5);
          z-index: 199;
          pointer-events: none;
        }
        .main-grid:not(.sidebar-closed) .sidebar-backdrop {
          display: block;
          pointer-events: auto;
        }
        /* respiro e empilhamento no mobile */
        #content {
          padding: 14px 12px;
        }
        .topbar {
          padding: 0 12px;
          gap: 8px;
        }
        .topbar .logo-mark .wm small {
          display: none;
        }
        .status-pill {
          display: none;
        }
        .cards {
          gap: 6px;
        }
        .stat {
          padding: 6px 11px 6px 10px;
        }
        .page-head {
          flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .page-head h2 {
          font-size: 17px;
        }
        .toolbar {
          padding: 12px;
        }
        .toolbar-filters .f {
          flex: 1 1 calc(50% - 12px);
          min-width: 130px;
        }
        .toolbar .f.search {
          flex: 1 1 100%;
        }
        .toolbar-actions {
          gap: 8px;
        }
        .toolbar-actions .vsep {
          display: none;
        }
        .toolbar-actions button {
          flex: 1 1 auto;
        }
        th,
        td {
          padding: 9px 10px;
        }
        .modal-bg {
          padding: 0;
          align-items: flex-end;
        }
        .modal {
          max-height: 96dvh;
          border-radius: 16px 16px 0 0;
        }
        .kv {
          grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
        }
        .pager {
          justify-content: center;
          flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
      }
      h2 {
        color: var(--txt);
      }
      /* cabeçalho de página padrão */
      .page-head {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 13px;
        margin-bottom: 6px;
      }
      .page-head h2 {
        margin: 0;
        font-size: 20px;
        font-weight: 800;
        letter-spacing: -0.3px;
      }
      .page-head .ph-icon {
        width: 40px;
        height: 40px;
        border-radius: 11px;
        background: var(--pri-soft);
        color: var(--pri2);
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        flex-shrink: 0;
        border: 1px solid #ffe2c2;
      }
      .page-head .ph-icon svg {
        width: 20px;
        height: 20px;
      }
      .page-sub {
        color: var(--muted);
        font-size: 13px;
        margin: 2px 0 20px;
        max-width: 780px;
        line-height: 1.5;
      }
      .cards {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 8px;
        margin-bottom: 18px;
      }
      .stat {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        background: var(--card);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 999px;
        padding: 7px 14px 7px 12px;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow);
        transition:
          transform 0.15s ease,
          box-shadow 0.15s ease;
      }
      .stat::before {
        content: "";
        width: 9px;
        height: 9px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        flex: 0 0 auto;
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--pri), var(--pri2));
      }
      .stat:hover {
        transform: translateY(-1px);
        box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.1);
      }
      .stat .n {
        font-size: 15px;
        font-weight: 800;
        color: var(--txt);
        line-height: 1;
      }
      .stat .l {
        color: var(--muted);
        font-size: 12px;
        font-weight: 600;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }
      .stat.clickable {
        cursor: pointer;
      }
      .stat.active {
        box-shadow:
          0 0 0 2px var(--pri),
          var(--shadow);
      }
      .stat.s-aceitar::before {
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, #22c55e, #15803d);
      }
      .stat.s-recusar::before {
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ef4444, #b91c1c);
      }
      .stat.s-analisar::before {
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f59e0b, #d97706);
      }
      .stat.s-aceitos::before {
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, #16a34a, #166534);
      }
      .stat.s-recusados::before {
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, #dc2626, #991b1b);
      }
      .stat.s-neutro::before {
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, #94a3b8, #64748b);
      }
      .toolbar {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 14px;
        margin-bottom: 16px;
        background: var(--card);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 14px;
        padding: 16px 18px;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow);
      }
      .toolbar-filters {
        display: flex;
        gap: 12px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        align-items: end;
      }
      .toolbar-actions {
        display: flex;
        gap: 10px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        align-items: center;
        padding-top: 14px;
        border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
      }
      .toolbar-actions .spacer {
        flex: 1;
      }
      .toolbar-actions .group-label {
        font-size: 11px;
        font-weight: 700;
        letter-spacing: 0.04em;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        color: var(--muted);
        margin-right: 2px;
      }
      .toolbar-actions .vsep {
        width: 1px;
        align-self: stretch;
        background: var(--line);
        margin: 2px 2px;
      }
      .toolbar .f {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 5px;
      }
      .toolbar .f label {
        font-size: 11px;
        color: var(--muted);
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      .toolbar .f.search {
        flex: 1;
        min-width: 200px;
      }
      .toolbar .f.chk-field {
        justify-content: flex-end;
      }
      .toolbar .f.chk-field .chk {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        white-space: nowrap;
        cursor: pointer;
        font-size: 13px;
        height: 38px;
      }
      table {
        width: 100%;
        border-collapse: collapse;
        background: var(--card);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 14px;
        overflow: hidden;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow);
      }
      /* contêineres de tabela: rolagem horizontal no mobile */
      #editaisTable,
      #catTable,
      #negTable,
      #docTable,
      #userTable {
        overflow-x: auto;
        -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
        border-radius: 14px;
      }
      #editaisTable table {
        min-width: 880px;
      }
      #catTable table,
      #docTable table {
        min-width: 680px;
      }
      #negTable table,
      #userTable table {
        min-width: 520px;
      }
      th,
      td {
        padding: 12px 14px;
        text-align: left;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
        font-size: 13px;
        vertical-align: top;
      }
      th {
        background: #f8fafc;
        color: var(--muted);
        font-size: 10.5px;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.7px;
        font-weight: 700;
      }
      tbody tr {
        transition: background 0.12s ease;
      }
      tr:last-child td {
        border-bottom: none;
      }
      tbody tr:hover td {
        background: var(--pri-soft);
      }
      .tag {
        display: inline-block;
        font-size: 11px;
        font-weight: 600;
        padding: 3px 10px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        white-space: nowrap;
      }
      .tag.novo {
        color: #2563eb;
        border-color: #bfdbfe;
        background: #eff6ff;
      }
      .tag.sug_a {
        color: #15803d;
        border-color: #bbf7d0;
        background: #f0fdf4;
      }
      .tag.sug_r {
        color: #b91c1c;
        border-color: #fecaca;
        background: #fef2f2;
      }
      .tag.aceito {
        background: var(--okbg);
        color: #15803d;
        border-color: #bbf7d0;
      }
      .tag.recusado {
        background: var(--nobg);
        color: #b91c1c;
        border-color: #fecaca;
      }
      .tag.analisando {
        color: var(--warn);
        border-color: #fde68a;
        background: #fffbeb;
      }
      .modo {
        font-size: 11px;
        color: var(--muted);
      }
      .score-bar {
        height: 7px;
        background: var(--chip);
        border-radius: 999px;
        overflow: hidden;
        width: 80px;
      }
      .score-bar i {
        display: block;
        height: 100%;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--pri), var(--pri2));
        transition: width 0.4s ease;
      }
      .row-actions {
        display: flex;
        gap: 6px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }
      .row-actions button {
        padding: 5px 11px;
        font-size: 12px;
      }
      /* linha clicável + resumo da IA */
      tr.edital-row {
        cursor: pointer;
      }
      tr.edital-row.has-ai td {
        border-bottom: none;
      }
      tr.ai-row {
        cursor: pointer;
      }
      tr.ai-row td {
        padding-top: 0;
        padding-bottom: 12px;
      }
      tr.ai-row:hover td,
      tr.edital-row.has-ai:hover td {
        background: var(--pri-soft);
      }
      .ai-callout {
        display: inline-flex;
        gap: 7px;
        align-items: center;
        font-size: 12px;
        line-height: 1.4;
        border-radius: 999px;
        padding: 4px 12px;
        border: 1px solid;
      }
      .ai-callout .ai-ico {
        flex: 0 0 auto;
        font-size: 12px;
      }
      .ai-callout.ok {
        background: #f0fdf4;
        border-color: #bbf7d0;
        color: #15603a;
      }
      .ai-callout.warn {
        background: #fffbeb;
        border-color: #fde68a;
        color: #92600a;
      }
      .ai-callout strong {
        font-weight: 700;
      }
      /* super triagem */
      .st-box {
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 12px;
        background: var(--card);
        margin: 16px 0 14px;
        overflow: hidden;
      }
      .st-head {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 10px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        padding: 11px 14px;
        background: #f8fafc;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
      }
      .st-head h3 {
        margin: 0;
        font-size: 14px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 7px;
      }
      .st-head .st-meta {
        font-size: 11.5px;
        color: var(--muted);
        margin-left: auto;
      }
      .st-verdict {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 10px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        padding: 12px 14px 0;
      }
      .st-pill {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        font-size: 12.5px;
        font-weight: 700;
        border-radius: 999px;
        padding: 5px 12px;
        border: 1px solid;
      }
      .st-pill.ok {
        background: #f0fdf4;
        border-color: #bbf7d0;
        color: #15603a;
      }
      .st-pill.warn {
        background: #fffbeb;
        border-color: #fde68a;
        color: #92600a;
      }
      .st-pill.no {
        background: #fef2f2;
        border-color: #fecaca;
        color: #b91c1c;
      }
      .st-conf {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        font-size: 12px;
        color: var(--muted);
      }
      .st-conf .bar {
        width: 90px;
        height: 6px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: #e6eaf0;
        overflow: hidden;
      }
      .st-conf .bar i {
        display: block;
        height: 100%;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: var(--pri);
      }
      .st-resumo {
        padding: 10px 14px 4px;
        font-size: 13px;
        line-height: 1.55;
        color: var(--txt);
      }
      .st-sec {
        padding: 10px 14px 2px;
      }
      .st-sec + .st-sec {
        border-top: 1px dashed var(--line);
        margin-top: 8px;
      }
      .st-sec .st-t {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 7px;
        font-size: 11px;
        font-weight: 700;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.04em;
        color: var(--muted);
        margin-bottom: 6px;
      }
      .st-sec .st-t .cnt {
        background: #eef2f7;
        color: var(--muted);
        border-radius: 999px;
        font-size: 10.5px;
        padding: 1px 7px;
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      .st-list {
        list-style: none;
        margin: 0 0 8px;
        padding: 0;
      }
      .st-list li {
        position: relative;
        padding: 3px 0 3px 16px;
        font-size: 12.5px;
        line-height: 1.5;
      }
      .st-list li::before {
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        left: 2px;
        top: 10px;
        width: 6px;
        height: 6px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #c9d2dd;
      }
      .st-list.risco li::before {
        background: #f87171;
      }
      .st-list.passo li::before {
        background: #60a5fa;
      }
      .st-list.item li::before {
        background: #34d399;
      }
      .st-foot {
        padding: 9px 14px;
        border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
        background: #fbfcfe;
        font-size: 11.5px;
        color: var(--muted);
        margin-top: 8px;
      }
      .st-empty {
        padding: 12px 14px;
        font-size: 12.5px;
        color: var(--muted);
        line-height: 1.5;
      }
      .pager {
        display: flex;
        gap: 10px;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: flex-end;
        margin-top: 14px;
        color: var(--muted);
        font-size: 13px;
      }
      /* modal */
      .modal-bg {
        position: fixed;
        inset: 0;
        background: rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.45);
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        z-index: 50;
        padding: 20px;
      }
      .modal {
        background: var(--card);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 14px;
        max-width: 900px;
        width: 100%;
        max-height: 90vh;
        overflow: auto;
        box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.25);
      }
      .modal header {
        position: sticky;
        top: 0;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--brand1), var(--brand2));
        color: #fff;
        height: auto;
        padding: 14px 18px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 10px;
        box-shadow: none;
      }
      .modal .body {
        padding: 20px;
      }
      .kv {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
        gap: 10px;
        margin-bottom: 16px;
      }
      .kv div {
        background: var(--chip);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 8px;
        padding: 8px 10px;
      }
      /* toast */
      #toastRoot {
        position: fixed;
        bottom: 22px;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translateX(-50%);
        z-index: 200;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 10px;
        align-items: center;
        pointer-events: none;
      }
      .toast {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 10px;
        min-width: 240px;
        max-width: 420px;
        background: var(--card);
        color: var(--txt);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-left: 4px solid var(--pri);
        padding: 12px 16px;
        border-radius: 12px;
        box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.18);
        font-size: 13.5px;
        font-weight: 500;
        pointer-events: auto;
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(12px);
        transition:
          opacity 0.25s ease,
          transform 0.25s ease;
      }
      .toast.show {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
      }
      .toast .ti {
        flex: 0 0 auto;
        width: 20px;
        height: 20px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        border-radius: 50%;
        color: #fff;
        font-size: 12px;
        font-weight: 700;
      }
      .toast.info {
        border-left-color: var(--pri);
      }
      .toast.info .ti {
        background: var(--pri);
      }
      .toast.success {
        border-left-color: var(--ok);
      }
      .toast.success .ti {
        background: var(--ok);
      }
      .toast.error {
        border-left-color: var(--no);
      }
      .toast.error .ti {
        background: var(--no);
      }
      .toast .tx {
        flex: 1;
        line-height: 1.4;
      }
      /* confirm dialog */
      .modal.confirm {
        max-width: 420px;
      }
      .modal.confirm .body {
        padding: 22px;
      }
      .confirm-ico {
        width: 46px;
        height: 46px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        font-size: 22px;
        margin: 0 auto 14px;
      }
      .confirm-ico.danger {
        background: var(--nobg);
        color: var(--no);
      }
      .confirm-ico.ask {
        background: var(--pri-soft);
        color: var(--pri2);
      }
      .confirm-msg {
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 15px;
        line-height: 1.5;
        color: var(--txt);
        margin-bottom: 20px;
      }
      .confirm-actions {
        display: flex;
        gap: 10px;
        justify-content: center;
      }
      .confirm-actions button {
        min-width: 110px;
      }
      .kv .k {
        font-size: 11px;
        color: var(--muted);
      }
      .kv .v {
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      .close {
        margin-left: auto;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
        color: #fff;
        font-size: 18px;
        padding: 2px 10px;
        border-radius: 8px;
      }
      .close:hover {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35);
      }
      /* chat — widget flutuante */
      #chatFab {
        position: fixed;
        right: 22px;
        bottom: 22px;
        z-index: 120;
        width: 58px;
        height: 58px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--pri), var(--pri2));
        color: #fff;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(224, 124, 18, 0.45);
        border: none;
        padding: 0;
      }
      #chatFab svg {
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
      }
      #chatFab:hover {
        filter: brightness(1.06);
        transform: translateY(-2px);
      }
      #chatFab.hidden {
        display: none !important;
      }
      #chatPanel {
        position: fixed;
        right: 22px;
        bottom: 22px;
        z-index: 121;
        width: 400px;
        max-width: calc(100vw - 28px);
        height: 620px;
        max-height: calc(100vh - 100px);
        background: var(--card);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 16px;
        box-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.28);
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        overflow: hidden;
        animation: cpIn 0.18s ease;
      }
      @keyframes cpIn {
        from {
          opacity: 0;
          transform: translateY(14px);
        }
        to {
          opacity: 1;
          transform: translateY(0);
        }
      }
      .cp-head {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        padding: 12px 14px;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--brand1), var(--brand2));
        color: #fff;
        flex-shrink: 0;
      }
      .cp-head svg {
        width: 18px;
        height: 18px;
      }
      .cp-head strong {
        font-size: 14px;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }
      .cp-ctx {
        font-size: 10.5px;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
        padding: 2px 8px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        white-space: nowrap;
        overflow: hidden;
        text-overflow: ellipsis;
        max-width: 130px;
        min-width: 0;
        flex-shrink: 1;
      }
      .cp-head .cp-icon {
        margin-left: 0;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16);
        color: #fff;
        width: 30px;
        height: 30px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        padding: 0;
        flex-shrink: 0;
      }
      .cp-head .cp-icon:first-of-type {
        margin-left: auto;
      }
      .cp-head .cp-icon:hover {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
      }
      .cp-head .cp-icon svg {
        width: 15px;
        height: 15px;
      }
      .cp-sessions {
        flex-shrink: 0;
        max-height: 200px;
        overflow: auto;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
        background: #fafbfd;
        padding: 8px;
      }
      .cp-sessions .s {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        padding: 8px 10px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        cursor: pointer;
        font-size: 12.5px;
        color: var(--muted);
      }
      .cp-sessions .s .s-title {
        flex: 1;
        white-space: nowrap;
        overflow: hidden;
        text-overflow: ellipsis;
      }
      .cp-sessions .s .s-del {
        flex-shrink: 0;
        background: transparent;
        border: none;
        color: var(--muted);
        padding: 3px;
        border-radius: 6px;
        opacity: 0;
        display: flex;
        transition: opacity 0.12s;
      }
      .cp-sessions .s:hover .s-del {
        opacity: 1;
      }
      .cp-sessions .s .s-del:hover {
        color: var(--no);
        background: var(--nobg);
      }
      .cp-sessions .s .s-del svg {
        width: 13px;
        height: 13px;
      }
      .cp-sessions .s:hover,
      .cp-sessions .s.active {
        background: var(--pri-soft);
        color: var(--pri2);
      }
      #chatPanel .msgs {
        flex: 1;
        overflow: auto;
        padding: 16px;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 12px;
        scroll-behavior: smooth;
        background:
          radial-gradient(
            ellipse 80% 40% at 50% 0%,
            #fff7ee 0%,
            transparent 60%
          ),
          #fcfdfe;
      }
      #chatPanel .composer {
        display: flex;
        align-items: flex-end;
        gap: 8px;
        padding: 10px 12px;
        border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
        flex-shrink: 0;
        background: var(--card);
      }
      #chatPanel .composer textarea {
        resize: none;
        min-height: 44px;
        max-height: 140px;
        height: 44px;
        line-height: 1.4;
        overflow-y: auto;
        field-sizing: content;
        border-radius: 14px;
        padding: 11px 14px;
      }
      #chatPanel .composer .btn-pri {
        flex-shrink: 0;
        width: 44px;
        height: 44px;
        padding: 0;
        border-radius: 50%;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
      }
      #chatPanel .composer .btn-pri svg {
        width: 18px;
        height: 18px;
      }
      /* indicador "digitando" */
      .typing {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 5px;
        padding: 2px 0;
      }
      .typing i {
        width: 7px;
        height: 7px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: var(--pri);
        opacity: 0.4;
        animation: typingDot 1.2s ease-in-out infinite;
      }
      .typing i:nth-child(2) {
        animation-delay: 0.18s;
      }
      .typing i:nth-child(3) {
        animation-delay: 0.36s;
      }
      @keyframes typingDot {
        0%,
        60%,
        100% {
          opacity: 0.35;
          transform: translateY(0);
        }
        30% {
          opacity: 1;
          transform: translateY(-3px);
        }
      }
      .cp-attach {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        padding: 0;
        width: 44px;
        flex-shrink: 0;
        color: var(--muted);
      }
      .cp-attach svg {
        width: 18px;
        height: 18px;
      }
      .cp-attach:hover {
        color: var(--pri2);
      }
      /* boas-vindas do chat */
      .cp-welcome {
        text-align: center;
        padding: 26px 18px 18px;
      }
      .cp-welcome .cp-avatar {
        width: 52px;
        height: 52px;
        border-radius: 16px;
        margin: 0 auto 10px;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--pri), var(--pri2));
        color: #fff;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(224, 124, 18, 0.35);
      }
      .cp-welcome .cp-avatar svg {
        width: 26px;
        height: 26px;
      }
      .cp-welcome h4 {
        margin: 0 0 4px;
        font-size: 15px;
        font-weight: 800;
        color: var(--txt);
      }
      .cp-welcome p {
        margin: 0;
        font-size: 12.5px;
        color: var(--muted);
        line-height: 1.5;
      }
      /* ações rápidas (placeholder do chat) */
      .cp-quick {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 8px;
        margin-top: 14px;
      }
      .cp-quick .qa-title {
        font-size: 11px;
        font-weight: 700;
        letter-spacing: 0.5px;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        color: var(--muted);
        text-align: center;
      }
      .cp-quick .qa-btn {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        width: 100%;
        text-align: left;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        padding: 10px 12px;
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 10px;
        background: #fff;
        color: var(--txt);
        font-size: 12.5px;
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      .cp-quick .qa-btn svg {
        width: 15px;
        height: 15px;
        color: var(--pri2);
        flex-shrink: 0;
      }
      .cp-quick .qa-btn:hover {
        background: var(--pri-soft);
        border-color: var(--pri);
        color: var(--pri2);
      }
      #chatPanel.hidden {
        display: none !important;
      }
      /* estado expandido (quase tela cheia) */
      #chatPanel.expanded {
        width: min(960px, calc(100vw - 44px));
        height: calc(100vh - 60px);
        right: 22px;
        bottom: 22px;
      }
      #chatPanel.expanded .msg {
        max-width: 75%;
      }
      @media (max-width: 520px) {
        #chatPanel {
          right: 0;
          bottom: 0;
          width: 100vw;
          max-width: 100vw;
          height: 100dvh;
          max-height: 100dvh;
          border-radius: 0;
        }
        #chatPanel.expanded {
          width: 100vw;
          max-width: 100vw;
          height: 100dvh;
          max-height: 100dvh;
          right: 0;
          bottom: 0;
          border-radius: 0;
        }
        #chatPanel.expanded .msg {
          max-width: 88%;
        }
        #chatFab {
          right: 16px;
          bottom: 16px;
        }
      }
      .msg {
        position: relative;
        max-width: 85%;
        padding: 11px 15px;
        border-radius: 14px;
        line-height: 1.55;
        box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.06);
        overflow-wrap: anywhere;
        word-break: break-word;
        animation: msgIn 0.18s ease;
      }
      @keyframes msgIn {
        from {
          opacity: 0;
          transform: translateY(6px);
        }
        to {
          opacity: 1;
          transform: translateY(0);
        }
      }
      .msg.err {
        align-self: flex-start;
        background: var(--nobg);
        border: 1px solid #fecaca;
        color: #991b1b;
        border-bottom-left-radius: 4px;
      }
      .msg .msg-copy {
        position: absolute;
        top: 6px;
        right: 6px;
        background: #fff;
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 7px;
        color: var(--muted);
        width: 26px;
        height: 26px;
        padding: 0;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        opacity: 0;
        transition: opacity 0.12s;
      }
      .msg.a:hover .msg-copy {
        opacity: 1;
      }
      .msg .msg-copy:hover {
        color: var(--pri2);
        border-color: var(--pri);
        background: var(--pri-soft);
      }
      .msg .msg-copy svg {
        width: 13px;
        height: 13px;
      }
      .msg.u {
        align-self: flex-end;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--pri), var(--pri2));
        color: #fff;
        border-bottom-right-radius: 4px;
        white-space: pre-wrap;
      }
      .msg.a {
        align-self: flex-start;
        background: #fff;
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-bottom-left-radius: 4px;
        min-width: 0;
      }
      /* markdown renderizado (respostas do assistente) */
      .msg.a > :first-child {
        margin-top: 0;
      }
      .msg.a > :last-child {
        margin-bottom: 0;
      }
      .msg.a p {
        margin: 0 0 8px;
      }
      .msg.a h1,
      .msg.a h2,
      .msg.a h3,
      .msg.a h4 {
        margin: 12px 0 6px;
        line-height: 1.25;
        font-weight: 700;
      }
      .msg.a h1 {
        font-size: 17px;
      }
      .msg.a h2 {
        font-size: 15.5px;
      }
      .msg.a h3 {
        font-size: 14px;
      }
      .msg.a h4 {
        font-size: 13px;
      }
      .msg.a ul,
      .msg.a ol {
        margin: 4px 0 8px;
        padding-left: 20px;
      }
      .msg.a li {
        margin: 2px 0;
      }
      .msg.a a {
        color: var(--pri2);
        font-weight: 600;
        text-decoration: none;
      }
      .msg.a a:hover {
        text-decoration: underline;
      }
      .msg.a code {
        background: var(--chip);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 5px;
        padding: 1px 5px;
        font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
        font-size: 12.5px;
      }
      .msg.a pre {
        background: #0f172a;
        color: #e2e8f0;
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 12px 14px;
        overflow-x: auto;
        margin: 8px 0;
      }
      .msg.a pre code {
        background: none;
        border: 0;
        padding: 0;
        color: inherit;
        font-size: 12.5px;
      }
      .msg.a blockquote {
        margin: 8px 0;
        padding: 4px 12px;
        border-left: 3px solid var(--pri);
        background: var(--pri-soft);
        border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
        color: var(--txt);
      }
      .msg.a hr {
        border: 0;
        border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
        margin: 12px 0;
      }
      .msg.a table {
        border-collapse: collapse;
        width: 100%;
        margin: 0;
        font-size: 12.5px;
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 10px;
        overflow: hidden;
      }
      .md-table-wrap {
        margin: 8px 0;
        overflow-x: auto;
        border-radius: 10px;
        -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
      }
      .msg.a th,
      .msg.a td {
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        padding: 7px 10px;
        text-align: left;
        vertical-align: top;
        overflow-wrap: anywhere;
      }
      .msg.a thead th {
        background: var(--pri-soft);
        color: var(--brand2);
        font-weight: 700;
        white-space: nowrap;
        position: sticky;
        top: 0;
      }
      .msg.a tbody tr:nth-child(even) {
        background: #fafbfd;
      }
      .msg.a strong {
        font-weight: 700;
      }
      .composer {
        display: flex;
        gap: 8px;
        padding: 12px;
        border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
      }
      .composer textarea {
        resize: none;
        height: 44px;
      }
      .muted {
        color: var(--muted);
      }
      .right-align {
        text-align: right;
      }
      .pill-link {
        font-size: 12px;
      }
      .empty {
        padding: 48px 40px;
        text-align: center;
        color: var(--muted);
        background: var(--card);
        border: 1px dashed var(--line);
        border-radius: 14px;
        font-size: 13.5px;
      }
      .badge {
        display: inline-block;
        font-size: 10.5px;
        padding: 2px 8px;
        border-radius: 7px;
        background: var(--chip);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        color: var(--muted);
        margin: 1px 0;
        line-height: 1.6;
      }
      /* origem do edital (Effecti / Licita Já) */
      .badge.src-effecti,
      .badge.src-licitaja {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 5px;
        font-size: 11px;
        font-weight: 700;
        padding: 3px 9px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        letter-spacing: 0.2px;
      }
      .badge.src-effecti::before,
      .badge.src-licitaja::before {
        content: "";
        width: 7px;
        height: 7px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        flex-shrink: 0;
      }
      .badge.src-effecti {
        background: #eff6ff;
        border-color: #bfdbfe;
        color: #1d4ed8;
      }
      .badge.src-effecti::before {
        background: #2563eb;
      }
      .badge.src-licitaja {
        background: #faf5ff;
        border-color: #e9d5ff;
        color: #7e22ce;
      }
      .badge.src-licitaja::before {
        background: #9333ea;
      }
      /* faixa de fonte na lateral da linha do edital */
      tr.edital-row > td:first-child,
      tr.ai-row > td:first-child {
        border-left: 4px solid transparent;
      }
      tr.f-effecti > td:first-child {
        border-left-color: #2563eb;
      }
      tr.f-licitaja > td:first-child {
        border-left-color: #9333ea;
      }
      tr.f-effecti.edital-row:hover td,
      tr.f-effecti.ai-row:hover td {
        background: #eff6ff;
      }
      tr.f-licitaja.edital-row:hover td,
      tr.f-licitaja.ai-row:hover td {
        background: #faf5ff;
      }
      /* cards de fonte (contadores clicáveis) */
      .stat.s-effecti::before {
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, #3b82f6, #1d4ed8);
      }
      .stat.s-licitaja::before {
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, #a855f7, #7e22ce);
      }
      .stat.s-effecti.active {
        box-shadow:
          0 0 0 2px #2563eb,
          var(--shadow);
      }
      .stat.s-licitaja.active {
        box-shadow:
          0 0 0 2px #9333ea,
          var(--shadow);
      }
      .badge.kw-strong {
        background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.1);
        border-color: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.35);
        color: #15803d;
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      /* ===== board / kanban (Gerenciar editais) ===== */
      .board-toolbar {
        display: flex;
        gap: 12px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        align-items: end;
        margin-bottom: 16px;
        background: var(--card);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 14px;
        padding: 14px 16px;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow);
      }
      .board-toolbar .f {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 5px;
      }
      .board-toolbar .f label {
        font-size: 11px;
        color: var(--muted);
        font-weight: 600;
      }
      .board-toolbar .f.search {
        flex: 1;
        min-width: 200px;
      }
      .board {
        display: flex;
        gap: 14px;
        overflow-x: auto;
        padding-bottom: 14px;
        align-items: flex-start;
      }
      .b-col {
        flex: 0 0 290px;
        background: #f8fafc;
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 14px;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        max-height: calc(100vh - 250px);
      }
      .b-col-head {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 8px;
        padding: 12px 14px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
        position: sticky;
        top: 0;
        background: #f8fafc;
        border-radius: 14px 14px 0 0;
        z-index: 1;
      }
      .b-col-head .dot {
        width: 9px;
        height: 9px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        flex-shrink: 0;
      }
      .b-col-head .t {
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 13px;
        color: var(--txt);
      }
      .b-col-head .c {
        margin-left: auto;
        font-size: 11px;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: var(--muted);
        background: var(--card);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 999px;
        padding: 1px 9px;
      }
      .b-col-body {
        padding: 10px;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 10px;
        overflow-y: auto;
        flex: 1;
        min-height: 60px;
      }
      .b-col.drag-over {
        outline: 2px dashed var(--pri);
        outline-offset: -4px;
      }
      .b-col.drag-over .b-col-body {
        background: var(--pri-soft);
      }
      .b-card {
        background: var(--card);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
        border-left: 4px solid var(--line);
        border-radius: 10px;
        padding: 11px 12px;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow);
        cursor: grab;
        transition:
          transform 0.1s ease,
          box-shadow 0.15s ease;
      }
      .b-card:hover {
        transform: translateY(-1px);
        box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(16, 24, 40, 0.1);
      }
      .b-card.dragging {
        opacity: 0.5;
        cursor: grabbing;
      }
      .b-card.prio-alta {
        border-left-color: var(--no);
      }
      .b-card.prio-media {
        border-left-color: var(--pri);
      }
      .b-card.prio-baixa {
        border-left-color: #94a3b8;
      }
      .b-card .bc-top {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        margin-bottom: 5px;
      }
      .b-card .bc-num {
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 13px;
        color: var(--txt);
      }
      .b-card .bc-org {
        font-size: 12px;
        color: var(--txt);
        line-height: 1.35;
        margin-bottom: 7px;
      }
      .b-card .bc-meta {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 5px;
        align-items: center;
      }
      .b-card .bc-prazo {
        font-size: 10.5px;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--muted);
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 4px;
      }
      .b-card .bc-prazo.late {
        color: var(--no);
      }
      .prio-pill {
        font-size: 10px;
        font-weight: 700;
        padding: 2px 8px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        letter-spacing: 0.4px;
      }
      .prio-pill.alta {
        background: var(--nobg);
        color: #b91c1c;
        border: 1px solid #fecaca;
      }
      .prio-pill.media {
        background: var(--pri-soft);
        color: var(--pri2);
        border: 1px solid #ffe2c2;
      }
      .prio-pill.baixa {
        background: var(--chip);
        color: var(--muted);
        border: 1px solid var(--line);
      }
      .b-card .bc-resp {
        font-size: 10.5px;
        color: var(--muted);
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 4px;
      }
    </style>
  </head>
  <body>
    <!-- ============ LOGIN ============ -->
    <div id="login">
      <div class="login-card">
        <div class="login-head">
          <img id="logoLogin" alt="NL Diagnóstica" />
          <h1>Editais de Licitação Integrada</h1>
          <p>Acesso restrito · uso interno</p>
        </div>
        <div class="login-body">
          <form id="loginForm">
            <label>E-mail</label>
            <input id="email" type="email" autocomplete="username" required />
            <label>Senha</label>
            <input
              id="password"
              type="password"
              autocomplete="current-password"
              required
            />
            <div style="margin-top: 18px">
              <button class="btn-pri" style="width: 100%" type="submit">
                Entrar
              </button>
            </div>
            <div class="err" id="loginErr"></div>
          </form>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ============ APP ============ -->
    <div id="app" class="hidden">
      <header class="topbar">
        <button
          class="toggle-sidebar-btn"
          id="toggleSidebarBtn"
          title="Alternar menu"
        >
          <i data-lucide="panel-left"></i>
        </button>
        <div class="logo-mark">
          <img id="logoHeader" alt="NL Diagnóstica" />
          <div class="wm"><b>NL Diagnóstica</b><small>Editais</small></div>
        </div>
        <div class="right">
          <span
            class="status-pill checking"
            id="healthPill"
            title="Verificando conexão com o servidor"
          >
            <span class="status-dot"></span
            ><span id="healthText">Verificando…</span>
          </span>
          <span class="role-pill" id="userPill"></span>
        </div>
      </header>

      <div class="main-grid" id="mainGrid">
        <div class="sidebar-backdrop" id="sidebarBackdrop"></div>

        <!-- SIDEBAR -->
        <aside id="sidebar">
          <div id="sidebar-header"><span class="sb-title">Menu</span></div>
          <nav id="nav" class="sidebar-nav">
            <button data-view="editais" class="active">
              <i data-lucide="search"></i><span>Buscar editais</span>
            </button>
            <button data-view="gestao">
              <i data-lucide="kanban-square"></i><span>Gerenciar editais</span>
            </button>
            <button data-view="catalogo" class="admin-only">
              <i data-lucide="package"></i><span>Catálogo</span>
            </button>
            <button data-view="documentos" class="admin-only">
              <i data-lucide="folder-open"></i><span>Documentos</span>
            </button>
            <button data-view="usuarios" class="admin-only">
              <i data-lucide="users"></i><span>Usuários</span>
            </button>
          </nav>
          <div class="sidebar-footer">
            <div class="user-profile">
              <div class="user-avatar" id="userAvatar">--</div>
              <div class="user-info">
                <div class="user-name" id="userName">...</div>
                <div class="user-role" id="userRole">...</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="footer-actions">
              <button class="footer-btn" id="logoutBtn" title="Sair do sistema">
                <i data-lucide="log-out"></i><span>Sair</span>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </aside>

        <!-- CONTENT -->
        <main id="content">
          <!-- EDITAIS -->
          <section id="view-editais">
            <div class="page-head">
              <div class="ph-icon"><i data-lucide="search"></i></div>
              <h2>Buscar editais</h2>
            </div>
            <p class="page-sub">
              Acompanhe os editais captados, veja o score de aderência e decida
              participar ou recusar. Os aceitos vão para
              <strong>Gerenciar editais</strong>.
            </p>
            <div class="cards" id="statCards"></div>
            <div class="toolbar">
              <div class="toolbar-filters">
                <div class="f">
                  <label>Status</label>
                  <select id="fStatus">
                    <option value="">Todos</option>
                    <option value="sugerido_aceitar">
                      Sugeridos p/ aceitar
                    </option>
                    <option value="sugerido_recusar">
                      Sugeridos p/ recusar
                    </option>
                    <option value="analisando">Para analisar</option>
                    <option value="aceito">Aceitos</option>
                    <option value="recusado">Recusados</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
                <div class="f">
                  <label>UF</label
                  ><input
                    id="fUf"
                    maxlength="2"
                    placeholder="SP"
                    style="width: 70px"
                  />
                </div>
                <div class="f">
                  <label>Fonte</label>
                  <select id="fFonte" style="width: 110px">
                    <option value="">Todas</option>
                    <option value="effecti">Effecti</option>
                    <option value="licitaja">Licita Já</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
                <div class="f search">
                  <label>Busca (objeto / órgão / nº)</label
                  ><input id="fSearch" placeholder="Buscar..." />
                </div>
                <div class="f">
                  <label>Ordenar por</label>
                  <select id="fSort">
                    <option value="">Relevância</option>
                    <option value="data_asc">Submissão (mais perto)</option>
                    <option value="data_desc">Submissão (mais longe)</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
                <div class="f chk-field">
                  <label
                    class="chk"
                    title="Não mostrar editais cuja data de submissão já passou"
                  >
                    <input type="checkbox" id="fHideExpired" checked />
                    Ocultar vencidos
                  </label>
                </div>
                <div class="f">
                  <label> </label
                  ><button class="btn-pri" id="btnFilter">Filtrar</button>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="toolbar-actions">
                <span class="group-label">Fontes</span>
                <button
                  class="btn-ghost"
                  id="btnPull"
                  title="Buscar novos editais na Effecti"
                >
                  ↻ Buscar Effecti
                </button>
                <button
                  class="btn-ghost"
                  id="btnPullLicitaja"
                  title="Buscar novos editais no Licita Já"
                >
                  ↻ Buscar Licita Já
                </button>
                <button
                  class="btn-ghost"
                  id="btnResync"
                  title="Reenviar à Effecti os editais com decisão ainda não sincronizada"
                >
                  ↻ Re-sincronizar
                </button>

                <span class="vsep"></span>
                <span class="group-label">Em lote</span>
                <button
                  class="btn-no"
                  id="btnRejectSugeridos"
                  title="Recusar de uma vez todos os editais sugeridos para recusar"
                >
                  Recusar sugeridos
                </button>
                <button
                  class="btn-ghost admin-only"
                  id="btnRematch"
                  title="Reaplica o match do catálogo atual nos editais ainda não decididos"
                >
                  ↻ Reprocessar análises
                </button>

                <span class="spacer"></span>
                <button
                  class="btn-ghost admin-only"
                  id="btnDeleteRecusados"
                  title="Apagar definitivamente todos os editais já recusados"
                >
                  🗑 Apagar recusados
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div id="editaisTable"></div>
            <div class="pager">
              <button class="btn-ghost" id="prevPage">‹ Anterior</button>
              <span id="pageInfo"></span>
              <button class="btn-ghost" id="nextPage">Próxima ›</button>
            </div>
          </section>

          <!-- GESTAO (KANBAN) -->
          <section id="view-gestao" class="hidden">
            <div class="page-head">
              <div class="ph-icon"><i data-lucide="kanban-square"></i></div>
              <h2>Gerenciar editais</h2>
              <button
                class="btn-ghost"
                id="btnBoardReload"
                style="margin-left: auto"
              >
                ↻ Atualizar
              </button>
            </div>
            <p class="page-sub">
              Acompanhe os editais <strong>aceitos</strong> ao longo do funil.
              Arraste os cards entre as etapas para atualizar o andamento.
            </p>
            <div class="board-toolbar">
              <div class="f">
                <label>UF</label
                ><input
                  id="bUf"
                  maxlength="2"
                  placeholder="SP"
                  style="width: 70px"
                />
              </div>
              <div class="f search">
                <label>Busca (objeto / órgão / nº)</label
                ><input id="bSearch" placeholder="Buscar..." />
              </div>
              <div class="f">
                <label> </label
                ><button class="btn-pri" id="btnBoardFilter">Filtrar</button>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div id="boardEmpty" class="empty hidden">
              Nenhum edital aceito ainda. Aceite editais na aba
              <strong>Buscar editais</strong> para acompanhá-los aqui.
            </div>
            <div class="board" id="board"></div>
          </section>

          <!-- CATALOGO -->
          <section id="view-catalogo" class="hidden">
            <div class="page-head">
              <div class="ph-icon"><i data-lucide="package"></i></div>
              <h2>Catálogo de produtos/serviços</h2>
              <button
                class="btn-ghost"
                id="btnSeedCat"
                style="margin-left: auto"
                title="Varre TODAS as bulas do RAG em lotes e gera termos fortes, sinônimos, palavras-chave e contexto por linha do catálogo"
              >
                🧠 Motor de bulas
              </button>
              <button class="btn-pri" id="btnAddCat">
                + Adicionar
              </button>
            </div>
            <p class="page-sub">
              O catálogo define o que a empresa oferece.
              <strong>Termos fortes</strong> decidem o match (um item só
              participa se casar pelo menos um); palavras-chave e sinônimos
              apenas reforçam o score. Após alterar, use
              <strong>↻ Reprocessar análises</strong> em Buscar editais.
            </p>
            <div id="catTable"></div>

            <div class="page-head" style="margin-top: 36px">
              <div class="ph-icon"><i data-lucide="ban"></i></div>
              <h2>Palavras indesejadas (bloqueio)</h2>
            </div>
            <p class="page-sub">
              Qualquer item de edital que contenha uma destas palavras é
              <strong>bloqueado automaticamente</strong>, mesmo que case um
              termo forte (ex.: glicemia, esponja, veterinário).
            </p>
            <div class="toolbar" style="align-items: flex-end">
              <div class="toolbar-filters">
                <div class="f">
                  <label>Palavra/expressão</label>
                  <input id="negTermo" placeholder="ex.: vinagre" />
                </div>
                <div class="f search">
                  <label>Motivo (opcional)</label>
                  <input id="negMotivo" placeholder="por que bloquear?" />
                </div>
                <div class="f">
                  <label> </label>
                  <button class="btn-pri" id="btnAddNeg">+ Bloquear</button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div id="negTable"></div>
          </section>

          <!-- DOCUMENTOS -->
          <section id="view-documentos" class="hidden">
            <div class="page-head">
              <div class="ph-icon"><i data-lucide="folder-open"></i></div>
              <h2>Documentos (RAG)</h2>
              <input type="file" id="docFileInput" multiple style="display: none" />
              <button
                class="btn-ghost"
                id="btnReindexAll"
                style="margin-left: auto"
              >
                ↻ Reprocessar pasta
              </button>
              <button class="btn-ghost" id="btnUploadDoc">
                ⬆ Enviar arquivos
              </button>
              <button class="btn-pri" id="btnAddDoc">+ Adicionar texto</button>
            </div>
            <p class="page-sub">
              Base de conhecimento do assistente: bulas, catálogos, manuais e
              regras. Selecione vários arquivos de uma vez (PDF com OCR
              automático). Todos os usuários autenticados consultam via IA.
            </p>
            <div id="docTable"></div>
          </section>

          <!-- USUARIOS -->
          <section id="view-usuarios" class="hidden">
            <div class="page-head">
              <div class="ph-icon"><i data-lucide="users"></i></div>
              <h2>Usuários</h2>
              <button class="btn-pri" id="btnAddUser" style="margin-left: auto">
                + Adicionar usuário
              </button>
            </div>
            <p class="page-sub">
              Gerencie quem acessa o sistema e os respectivos perfis de
              permissão.
            </p>
            <div id="userTable"></div>
          </section>
        </main>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ASSISTENTE IA (widget flutuante) -->
    <button id="chatFab" title="Assistente IA">
      <i data-lucide="message-square"></i>
    </button>
    <div id="chatPanel" class="hidden">
      <header class="cp-head">
        <i data-lucide="bot"></i>
        <strong>Assistente IA</strong>
        <span class="cp-ctx" id="chatCtx"></span>
        <button class="cp-icon" id="chatExpand" title="Expandir">
          <i data-lucide="maximize-2"></i>
        </button>
        <button class="cp-icon" id="chatHistoryBtn" title="Conversas">
          <i data-lucide="history"></i>
        </button>
        <button class="cp-icon" id="newChat" title="Nova conversa">
          <i data-lucide="plus"></i>
        </button>
        <button class="cp-icon" id="chatClose" title="Fechar">
          <i data-lucide="x"></i>
        </button>
      </header>
      <div class="cp-sessions hidden" id="chatSessions">
        <div id="sessionList"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="msgs" id="msgs"></div>
      <div class="composer">
        <input type="file" id="chatFileInput" style="display: none" />
        <button
          class="btn-ghost cp-attach"
          id="chatAttach"
          title="Anexar arquivo a esta conversa"
        >
          <i data-lucide="paperclip"></i>
        </button>
        <textarea
          id="chatInput"
          placeholder="Pergunte sobre editais, catálogo, documentos…"
        ></textarea>
        <button class="btn-pri" id="sendChat" title="Enviar (Enter)">
          <i data-lucide="send"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div id="modalRoot"></div>
    <div id="toastRoot"></div>

    <script>
      /* ============ CONFIG ============ */
      const CONFIG = {

          /[&<>"]/g,
          (c) => ({ "&": "&", "<": "<", ">": ">", '"': """ })[c],
        );

      // remove marcação HTML (ex.: <em>, <mark>) que vem dos portais de busca e normaliza espaços
      const stripTags = (s) =>
        (s == null ? "" : String(s))
          .replace(/<\/?[^>]+>/g, "")
          .replace(/ /gi, " ")
          .replace(/&/gi, "&")
          .replace(/</gi, "<")

          .replace(/&#0?39;|'/gi, "'")

      const txt = (s) => esc(stripTags(s));
      const mdLite = (s) =>

          .replace(/\n/g, "<br>"); // legado (mantido p/ compat.)
      /* ---- renderizador de markdown (respostas do assistente) ---- */
      // inline: escapa HTML primeiro, depois aplica code/bold/italic/links com segurança
      function mdInline(s) {
        let h = esc(s);
        // `código`
        h = h.replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, (m, c) => `<code>${c}</code>`);
        // links [texto](url) — só http(s)/mailto
        h = h.replace(
          /\[([^\]]+)\]\((https?:\/\/[^\s)]+|mailto:[^\s)]+)\)/g,
          (m, t, u) =>
            `<a href="${u}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">${t}</a>`,
        );
        // **negrito** e __negrito__
        h = h
          .replace(/\*\*([^*]+)\*\*/g, "<strong>$1</strong>")
          .replace(/__([^_]+)__/g, "<strong>$1</strong>");
        // *itálico* e _itálico_
        h = h
          .replace(/(^|[^*])\*([^*\n]+)\*(?!\*)/g, "$1<em>$2</em>")
          .replace(/(^|[^_])_([^_\n]+)_(?!_)/g, "$1<em>$2</em>");
        return h;
      }
      function mdTableRow(line) {
        let s = line.trim().replace(/^\|/, "").replace(/\|$/, "");
        return s.split("|").map((c) => c.trim());
      }
      function mdRender(src) {
        if (src == null) return "";
        const lines = String(src).replace(/\r\n/g, "\n").split("\n");
        let html = "",
          i = 0;
        const flushList = () => {}; // placeholder
        while (i < lines.length) {
          let line = lines[i];
          // bloco de código cercado ```
          const fence = line.match(/^\s*```(\w*)\s*$/);
          if (fence) {
            let code = [];
            i++;
            while (i < lines.length && !/^\s*```\s*$/.test(lines[i])) {
              code.push(lines[i]);
              i++;
            }
            i++; // pula fence de fechamento
            html += `<pre><code>${esc(code.join("\n"))}</code></pre>`;
            continue;
          }
          // tabela GFM: linha com | seguida de linha separadora |---|
          if (
            /\|/.test(line) &&
            i + 1 < lines.length &&
            /^\s*\|?\s*:?-+/.test(lines[i + 1]) &&
            /\|/.test(lines[i + 1])
          ) {
            const head = mdTableRow(line);
            i += 2; // pula cabeçalho e separador
            let body = [];
            while (
              i < lines.length &&
              /\|/.test(lines[i]) &&
              lines[i].trim() !== ""
            ) {
              body.push(mdTableRow(lines[i]));
              i++;
            }
            const tableHtml =
              "<table><thead><tr>" +
              head.map((c) => `<th>${mdInline(c)}</th>`).join("") +
              "</tr></thead><tbody>" +
              body
                .map(
                  (r) =>
                    "<tr>" +
                    head
                      .map((_, k) => `<td>${mdInline(r[k] || "")}</td>`)
                      .join("") +
                    "</tr>",
                )
                .join("") +
              "</tbody></table>";
            html += `<div class="md-table-wrap">${tableHtml}</div>`;
            continue;
          }
          // título
          const hm = line.match(/^(#{1,4})\s+(.*)$/);
          if (hm) {
            const lvl = hm[1].length;
            html += `<h${lvl}>${mdInline(hm[2])}</h${lvl}>`;
            i++;
            continue;
          }
          // linha horizontal
          if (/^\s*(---|\*\*\*|___)\s*$/.test(line)) {
            html += "<hr>";
            i++;
            continue;
          }
          // citação
          if (/^\s*>\s?/.test(line)) {
            let q = [];
            while (i < lines.length && /^\s*>\s?/.test(lines[i])) {
              q.push(lines[i].replace(/^\s*>\s?/, ""));
              i++;
            }
            html += `<blockquote>${mdInline(q.join("\n")).replace(/\n/g, "<br>")}</blockquote>`;
            continue;
          }
          // lista não-ordenada
          if (/^\s*[-*+]\s+/.test(line)) {
            let items = [];
            while (i < lines.length && /^\s*[-*+]\s+/.test(lines[i])) {
              items.push(lines[i].replace(/^\s*[-*+]\s+/, ""));
              i++;
            }
            html +=
              "<ul>" +
              items.map((t) => `<li>${mdInline(t)}</li>`).join("") +
              "</ul>";
            continue;
          }
          // lista ordenada
          if (/^\s*\d+[.)]\s+/.test(line)) {
            let items = [];
            while (i < lines.length && /^\s*\d+[.)]\s+/.test(lines[i])) {
              items.push(lines[i].replace(/^\s*\d+[.)]\s+/, ""));
              i++;
            }
            html +=
              "<ol>" +
              items.map((t) => `<li>${mdInline(t)}</li>`).join("") +
              "</ol>";
            continue;
          }
          // linha em branco
          if (line.trim() === "") {
            i++;
            continue;
          }
          // parágrafo (agrupa linhas consecutivas)
          let para = [];
          while (
            i < lines.length &&
            lines[i].trim() !== "" &&
            !/^\s*(#{1,4}\s|[-*+]\s|\d+[.)]\s|>\s?|```)/.test(lines[i]) &&
            !(
              /\|/.test(lines[i]) &&
              i + 1 < lines.length &&
              /^\s*\|?\s*:?-+/.test(lines[i + 1])
            )
          ) {
            para.push(lines[i]);
            i++;
          }
          html += `<p>${mdInline(para.join("\n")).replace(/\n/g, "<br>")}</p>`;
        }
        return html;
      }

      function statusTag(st) {

      function rowHtml(r) {
        const score = Math.round((r.score_match || 0) * 100);

        const fonteBadge = `<div class="badge src-${esc(fonte)}">${fonte === "licitaja" ? "Licita Já" : "Effecti"}</div>`;

        const decided = r.status === "aceito" || r.status === "recusado";
        const acts = decided

        const modoMap = {

        try {
          const { data, error } = await sb.rpc("nl_pending_sync", {
            p_uf: ($("#fUf").value || "").trim().toUpperCase() || null,
          });
          if (error) throw error;
          const itens = data || [];
          if (!itens.length) {
            toast("Nenhum edital pendente de sincronização.", "success");
            return;
          }
          let ok = 0,
            fail = 0;
          for (const it of itens) {
            try {
              const resp = await fetch(
                `${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-effecti-sync`,
                {
                  method: "POST",
                  headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
                  body: JSON.stringify({
                    idLicitacao: Number(it.id_licitacao),
                    acao: it.acao,
                    motivo: it.motivo || "",
                    motivoEffecti: it.motivo_effecti || "OUTROS",
                  }),
                },
              );
              // corpo vazio = execução do n8n morreu no meio (falha silenciosa)
              const txt = await resp.text();
              if (resp.ok && txt) ok++;
              else fail++;
            } catch {
              fail++;
            }
          }
          toast(
            `Re-sincronização: ${ok} ok${fail ? `, ${fail} falha(s)` : ""}.`,
            fail ? "error" : "success",
          );
          loadStats();
          loadEditais();
        } catch (e) {
          toast("Erro ao re-sincronizar: " + e.message, "error");

          btn.disabled = false;
          btn.textContent = old;

        const btn = $("#btnRematch");
