        const old = btn.textContent;
        try {
          // (re)inicia o conjunto-alvo e processa em lotes até concluir,
          // mantendo cada chamada abaixo do statement timeout do Supabase.
          await sb.rpc("nl_rematch_reset", { p_only_pending: true });
          let total = 0;
          let restantes = Infinity;
          let guard = 0;
          while (restantes > 0 && guard < 200) {
            guard++;
            const { data, error } = await sb.rpc("nl_rematch_all", {
              p_only_pending: true,
              p_limit: 40,
            });
            if (error) throw error;
            total += data?.reprocessados ?? 0;
            restantes = data?.restantes ?? 0;
            btn.textContent = `Reprocessando... (${total}${restantes ? ` · faltam ${restantes}` : ""})`;
            if ((data?.reprocessados ?? 0) === 0) break; // evita loop infinito
          }
          toast(`Reprocessados ${total} editais.`, "success");
          loadStats();
          loadEditais();
        } catch (e) {
          toast("Erro ao reprocessar: " + e.message, "error");
        } finally {
          btn.disabled = false;
          btn.textContent = old;
        }
      });

      /* ---- decision ---- */
      async function decide(editalId, idLic, acao, motivo, motivoEffecti) {
        const { data, error } = await sb.rpc("nl_record_decision", {
          p_edital_id: editalId,
          p_acao: acao,
          p_motivo: motivo || null,
          p_motivo_effecti: motivoEffecti || null,
          p_origem: "humano",
        });
        if (error) {
          toast("Erro ao registrar decisão: " + error.message, "error");
          return;
        }
        const lic = idLic || (data && data.id_licitacao);
        if (lic) {
          try {
            const resp = await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-effecti-sync`, {
              method: "POST",
              headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
              body: JSON.stringify({
                idLicitacao: Number(lic),
                acao,
                motivo: motivo || "",
                motivoEffecti: motivoEffecti || "OUTROS",
              }),
            });
            const txt = await resp.text();
            if (!resp.ok || !txt) {
              toast(
                "Decisão salva, mas a Effecti não confirmou o sync. Use o botão ↻ Re-sincronizar.",
                "error",
              );
            }
          } catch (e) {
            toast(
              "Decisão salva, mas falhou sincronizar com a Effecti: " +
                e.message,
            );
          }
        }
        closeModal();
        toast(
          acao === "aceitar"
            ? lic
              ? "Edital aceito (favoritado na Effecti)."
              : "Edital aceito."
            : "Edital recusado.",
        );
        loadStats();
        loadEditais();
      }

      /* ---- edital detail ---- */
      function superTriagemBlock(e) {

        const recMap = {
          aceitar: ["ok", "✅", "Recomenda aceitar"],
          recusar: ["no", "⛔", "Recomenda recusar"],

          "warn",
          "🔎",
          ap.recomendacao || "—",
        ];
        // confiança pode vir 0..1 ou 0..100 — normaliza para %
        const confRaw = Number(ap.confianca) || 0;

        );

          .join("");

          )
          .join("");

      <div class="st-verdict">
        <span class="st-pill ${cls}">${ico} ${lbl}</span>
        <span class="st-conf"><span class="bar"><i style="width:${conf}%"></i></span>${conf}% de confiança</span>
      </div>
      ${ap.resumo ? `<div class="st-resumo">${esc(ap.resumo)}</div>` : ""}
      ${sec("Itens compatíveis", "🧪", itens, itensArr.length, "item")}
      ${sec("Exigências do edital", "📋", exig, exigArr.length)}
      ${sec("Riscos", "⚠️", riscos, riscosArr.length, "risco")}

      <div class="st-foot">Análise gerada por IA a partir do edital — revise antes de decidir.</div>
    </div>`;

      async function openEdital(id) {
        const { data, error } = await sb.rpc("nl_get_edital", {
          p_edital_id: id,
        });
        if (error) {
          toast("Erro: " + error.message, "error");
          return;
        }
        const e = data.edital,
          items = data.itens || [];
        const decided = e.status === "aceito" || e.status === "recusado";
        // valor estimado: usa o do edital ou soma os itens (valor_total ou qtd × unitário)
        let valorEst = Number(e.valor_total_estimado) || 0;
        if (valorEst <= 0) {
          valorEst = items.reduce(
            (s, it) =>
              s +
              (Number(it.valor_total) ||
                (Number(it.valor_unitario) || 0) *
                  (Number(it.quantidade) || 0)),
            0,
          );
        }
        // group items by lote
        const lotes = {};
        items.forEach((it) => {
          const k = it.lote || "—";
          (lotes[k] = lotes[k] || []).push(it);
        });
        const loteHtml = Object.entries(lotes)
          .map(([lote, its]) => {
            const all = its.every((i) => i.participa),
              some = its.some((i) => i.participa);
            const cov =
              lote === "—"
                ? ""
                : `<div class="badge" style="margin-bottom:6px">Lote ${esc(lote)} — ${all ? "fornecível 100%" : some ? "parcial" : "fora de escopo"}</div>`;
            const rows = its
              .map(
                (it) => `<tr>
      <td>${esc(it.item_num ?? "")}</td>
      <td>${txt((it.produto_licitado || "").slice(0, 400)).slice(0, 160)}</td>
      <td>${it.quantidade ?? ""} ${esc(it.unidade || "")}</td>
      <td>${it.catalogo_descricao ? `<span class="tag sug_a">${txt(it.catalogo_descricao)}</span>` : '<span class="muted">—</span>'}</td>
      <td>${Math.round((it.match_score || 0) * 100)}%</td>
      <td>${it.participa ? '<span class="tag sug_a">sim</span>' : '<span class="tag sug_r">não</span>'}
          ${!decided ? `<button class="btn-ghost" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:11px" data-toggle="${it.id}" data-cur="${it.participa ? 1 : 0}">⇄</button>` : ""}</td>
    </tr>`,
              )
              .join("");
            return `${cov}<table style="margin-bottom:14px"><thead><tr><th>Item</th><th>Produto licitado</th><th>Qtd</th><th>Catálogo</th><th>Match</th><th>Participa</th></tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>`;
          })
          .join("");
        openModal(`<header><strong>Edital ${esc(e.numero_edital || "")}</strong> <span class="badge src-${esc(e.fonte || "effecti")}">${(e.fonte || "effecti") === "licitaja" ? "Licita Já" : "Effecti"}</span> ${statusTag(e.status)}<button class="close">×</button></header>
   <div class="body">
    <div class="kv">
      <div><div class="k">Órgão</div><div class="v">${txt(e.orgao) || "—"}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">UF</div><div class="v">${esc(e.uf || "—")}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Modalidade</div><div class="v">${txt(e.modalidade) || "—"}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Data da licitação</div><div class="v">${fmtDate(e.data_abertura)}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Valor estimado</div><div class="v">${fmtMoney(valorEst)}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Modo sugerido</div><div class="v">${esc(e.modo_participacao || "—")} (score ${Math.round((e.score_match || 0) * 100)}%)</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Portal</div><div class="v">${esc(e.portal_nome || "—")}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Links</div><div class="v">${e.url_edital ? `<a href="${esc(e.url_edital)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">edital ↗</a>` : "—"}</div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:12px"><div class="k muted">Objeto</div>${txt(e.objeto) || "—"}</div>
    ${
      !decided && (e.status === "sugerido_aceitar" || e.status === "analisando")
        ? `<div class="ai-callout ${e.status === "sugerido_aceitar" ? "ok" : "warn"}" style="margin-bottom:14px"><span class="ai-ico">${e.status === "sugerido_aceitar" ? "✅" : "🔎"}</span><span>${aiResumo({ status: e.status, score_match: e.score_match, itens_participa: items.filter((i) => i.participa).length, itens_total: items.length, modo_participacao: e.modo_participacao })}</span></div>`
        : e.justificativa_ia
          ? `<div class="badge" style="margin-bottom:12px">IA: ${txt(e.justificativa_ia)}</div>`
          : ""
    }
    ${superTriagemBlock(e)}
    <h3 style="margin:6px 0">Itens / lotes</h3>
    ${!decided ? `<div class="modo" style="margin-bottom:8px">Revise os itens abaixo. Use o botão <strong>⇄</strong> para incluir ou remover itens da participação e, ao final, <strong>aceite</strong> ou <strong>recuse</strong> o edital.</div>` : ""}
    ${items.length ? loteHtml : '<div class="empty">Sem itens.</div>'}
    ${

        ? `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:10px">

        if (error) {
          $("#board").innerHTML =
            `<div class="empty">Erro: ${esc(error.message)}</div>`;
          return;
        }
        boardRows = data || [];
        $("#boardEmpty").classList.toggle("hidden", boardRows.length > 0);
        renderBoard();
      }
      function renderBoard() {
        const byStage = {};
        BOARD_STAGES.forEach(([k]) => (byStage[k] = []));
        boardRows.forEach((r) => {
          const k = byStage[r.kanban_stage] ? r.kanban_stage : "qualificado";
          byStage[k].push(r);
        });
        $("#board").innerHTML = BOARD_STAGES.map(([key, label, color]) => {
          const cards = byStage[key];
          return `<div class="b-col" data-stage="${key}">
      <div class="b-col-head"><span class="dot" style="background:${color}"></span><span class="t">${esc(label)}</span><span class="c">${cards.length}</span></div>
      <div class="b-col-body" data-stage="${key}">${cards.map(boardCardHtml).join("") || '<div class="muted" style="font-size:11.5px;text-align:center;padding:10px 0">—</div>'}</div>
    </div>`;
        }).join("");
        bindBoard();
        if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
      }
      function boardCardHtml(r) {
        const prio = r.gestao_prioridade || "media";
        let prazoHtml = "";
        if (r.gestao_prazo) {
          const d = new Date(r.gestao_prazo + "T00:00:00");
          const late = d < new Date(new Date().toDateString());
          prazoHtml = `<span class="bc-prazo ${late ? "late" : ""}"><i data-lucide="calendar"></i>${fmtDate(r.gestao_prazo)}</span>`;
        }
        const resp = r.gestao_responsavel
          ? `<span class="bc-resp"><i data-lucide="user"></i>${esc(r.gestao_responsavel)}</span>`
          : "";
        const val =
          Number(r.gestao_valor_proposta || r.valor_total_estimado) || 0;
        const fonte = r.fonte || "effecti";
        return `<div class="b-card prio-${prio}" draggable="true" data-id="${r.id}" data-stage="${r.kanban_stage}">
    <div class="bc-top"><span class="bc-num">${esc(r.numero_edital || "—")}</span><span class="badge src-${esc(fonte)}" style="font-size:9.5px;padding:1px 7px">${fonte === "licitaja" ? "Licita Já" : "Effecti"}</span><span class="prio-pill ${prio}" style="margin-left:auto">${PRIO_LABEL[prio]}</span></div>
    <div class="bc-org">${txt(r.orgao) || "—"}${r.uf ? ` · ${esc(r.uf)}` : ""}</div>
    <div class="bc-meta">${prazoHtml}${val > 0 ? `<span class="badge">${fmtMoney(val)}</span>` : ""}${resp}</div>
  </div>`;
      }
      function bindBoard() {
        let dragId = null;
        document.querySelectorAll("#board .b-card").forEach((card) => {
          card.addEventListener("click", () => openBoardCard(card.dataset.id));
          card.addEventListener("dragstart", (e) => {
            dragId = card.dataset.id;
            card.classList.add("dragging");
            e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = "move";
          });
          card.addEventListener("dragend", () => {
            card.classList.remove("dragging");
            document
              .querySelectorAll("#board .b-col")
              .forEach((c) => c.classList.remove("drag-over"));
          });
        });
        document.querySelectorAll("#board .b-col").forEach((col) => {
          col.addEventListener("dragover", (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            col.classList.add("drag-over");
          });
          col.addEventListener("dragleave", () =>
            col.classList.remove("drag-over"),
          );
          col.addEventListener("drop", (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            col.classList.remove("drag-over");
            const stage = col.dataset.stage;
            if (dragId) changeStage(dragId, stage);
            dragId = null;
          });
        });
      }
      async function changeStage(id, stage) {
        const row = boardRows.find((r) => r.id === id);
        if (!row || row.kanban_stage === stage) return;
        const prev = row.kanban_stage;
        row.kanban_stage = stage;
        renderBoard();
        const { error } = await sb.rpc("nl_update_gestao", {
          p_edital_id: id,
          p_stage: stage,
        });
        if (error) {
          row.kanban_stage = prev;
          renderBoard();
          toast("Erro ao mover edital: " + error.message, "error");
        }
      }
      async function openBoardCard(id) {
        const { data, error } = await sb.rpc("nl_get_edital", {
          p_edital_id: id,
        });
        if (error) {
          toast("Erro: " + error.message, "error");
          return;
        }
        const e = data.edital;
        const stageOpts = BOARD_STAGES.map(
          ([k, l]) =>
            `<option value="${k}" ${e.kanban_stage === k ? "selected" : ""}>${esc(l)}</option>`,
        ).join("");
        const prioOpts = ["alta", "media", "baixa"]
          .map(
            (p) =>
              `<option value="${p}" ${(e.gestao_prioridade || "media") === p ? "selected" : ""}>${PRIO_LABEL[p]}</option>`,
          )
          .join("");
        openModal(`<header><strong>Gerir edital ${esc(e.numero_edital || "")}</strong><button class="close">×</button></header>
   <div class="body">
    <div class="kv">
      <div><div class="k">Órgão</div><div class="v">${txt(e.orgao) || "—"}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">UF</div><div class="v">${esc(e.uf || "—")}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Data da licitação</div><div class="v">${fmtDate(e.data_abertura)}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Links</div><div class="v">${e.url_edital ? `<a href="${esc(e.url_edital)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">edital ↗</a>` : "—"}</div></div>
    </div>
    ${e.objeto ? `<div style="margin-bottom:14px"><div class="k muted">Objeto</div>${txt((e.objeto || "").slice(0, 500))}</div>` : ""}
    <h3 style="margin:6px 0 10px">Acompanhamento</h3>
    <div class="kv" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr))">
      <div style="background:transparent;border:none;padding:0"><label class="muted">Etapa</label><select id="gStage">${stageOpts}</select></div>
      <div style="background:transparent;border:none;padding:0"><label class="muted">Prioridade</label><select id="gPrio">${prioOpts}</select></div>
      <div style="background:transparent;border:none;padding:0"><label class="muted">Responsável</label><input id="gResp" value="${esc(e.gestao_responsavel || "")}" placeholder="Nome" /></div>
      <div style="background:transparent;border:none;padding:0"><label class="muted">Prazo da proposta</label><input id="gPrazo" type="date" value="${esc(e.gestao_prazo || "")}" /></div>
      <div style="background:transparent;border:none;padding:0"><label class="muted">Valor da proposta (R$)</label><input id="gValor" type="number" step="0.01" min="0" value="${e.gestao_valor_proposta ?? ""}" placeholder="0,00" /></div>
    </div>
    <label class="muted" style="display:block;margin-top:6px">Observações</label>
    <textarea id="gObs" rows="3" placeholder="Anotações de andamento...">${esc(e.gestao_observacoes || "")}</textarea>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:16px">
      <button class="btn-ghost" id="gDetail">Ver itens / detalhe</button>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
        <button class="btn-ghost" id="gCancel">Cancelar</button>
        <button class="btn-pri" id="gSave">Salvar</button>
      </div>
    </div>
   </div>`);
        if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
        $("#gCancel").onclick = closeModal;
        $("#gDetail").onclick = () => openEdital(id);
        $("#gSave").onclick = async () => {
          const btn = $("#gSave");
          btn.disabled = true;
          const { error } = await sb.rpc("nl_update_gestao", {
            p_edital_id: id,
            p_stage: $("#gStage").value,
            p_prioridade: $("#gPrio").value,
            p_responsavel: $("#gResp").value.trim() || null,
            p_prazo: $("#gPrazo").value || null,
            p_valor_proposta:
              $("#gValor").value !== "" ? Number($("#gValor").value) : null,
            p_observacoes: $("#gObs").value.trim() || null,
          });
          btn.disabled = false;
          if (error) {
            toast("Erro ao salvar: " + error.message, "error");
            return;
          }
          closeModal();
          toast("Edital atualizado.", "success");
          loadBoard();
        };
      }
      $("#btnBoardReload").addEventListener("click", loadBoard);
      $("#btnBoardFilter").addEventListener("click", loadBoard);
      $("#bSearch").addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
        if (e.key === "Enter") loadBoard();
      });

      /* ============ CATALOGO ============ */
      async function loadCatalogo() {
        const { data, error } = await sb.rpc("nl_list_catalogo", {
          p_only_active: false,
        });
        if (error) {
          $("#catTable").innerHTML =
            `<div class="empty">Erro: ${esc(error.message)}</div>`;
          return;
        }
        const rows = (data || [])
          .map(
            (c) => `<tr>
    <td>${esc(c.linha || "—")}</td><td><strong>${esc(c.descricao)}</strong><div class="modo">${esc(c.finalidade || "")}</div></td>
    <td>${esc(c.tipo)}</td>
    <td>${(c.termos_fortes || []).map((k) => `<span class="badge kw-strong">${esc(k)}</span>`).join(" ") || '<span class="modo">—</span>'}</td>
    <td>${(c.palavras_chave || []).concat(c.sinonimos || []).map((k) => `<span class="badge">${esc(k)}</span>`).join(" ")}</td>
    <td>${c.ativo ? '<span class="tag sug_a">ativo</span>' : '<span class="tag sug_r">inativo</span>'}</td>
    <td class="row-actions"><button class="btn-ghost" data-edit='${esc(JSON.stringify(c))}'>editar</button><button class="btn-no" data-del="${c.id}">excluir</button></td>
  </tr>`,
          )
          .join("");
        $("#catTable").innerHTML = rows
          ? `<table><thead><tr><th>Linha</th><th>Descrição</th><th>Tipo</th><th>Termos fortes</th><th>Palavras de apoio</th><th>Status</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>`
          : '<div class="empty">Catálogo vazio.</div>';
        document.querySelectorAll("#catTable [data-del]").forEach(
          (b) =>
            (b.onclick = async () => {
              if (
                await confirmDialog("Excluir este item do catálogo?", {
                  okText: "Excluir",
                })
              ) {
                await sb.rpc("nl_admin_delete_catalogo", {
                  p_id: b.dataset.del,
                });
                toast("Item excluído.", "success");
                loadCatalogo();
              }
            }),
        );

          .querySelectorAll("#catTable [data-edit]")

      }
      $("#btnAddCat").addEventListener("click", () => openCatModal(null));
      $("#btnSeedCat").addEventListener("click", async () => {
        if (
          !(await confirmDialog(
            "Rodar o motor de bulas? Ele varre TODAS as bulas do RAG (texto completo, em lotes) e gera termos fortes, sinônimos, palavras-chave e contexto por linha do catálogo. Nada é removido — só adiciona.",
            { okText: "Rodar motor" },
          ))
        )
          return;
        const btn = $("#btnSeedCat");
        btn.disabled = true;
        const old = btn.textContent;
        btn.textContent = "🧠 Processando bulas… (pode levar vários minutos)";
        try {
          const r = await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-catalogo-seed`, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: "{}",
          });
          if (!r.ok) throw new Error("HTTP " + r.status);
          const j = await r.json();
          toast(
            `Motor de bulas iniciado: ${j.total_lotes ?? "?"} lote(s) em processamento. Os termos e contextos vão sendo adicionados ao catálogo — recarregue em alguns minutos e use “↻ Reprocessar análises”.`,
            "success",
          );
          loadCatalogo();
        } catch (e2) {
          toast("Erro no motor de bulas: " + e2.message, "error");
        } finally {
          btn.disabled = false;
          btn.textContent = old;
        }
      });
      function openCatModal(c) {
        c = c || {};
        openModal(`<header><strong>${c.id ? "Editar" : "Novo"} item de catálogo</strong><button class="close">×</button></header><div class="body">
    <label class="muted">Descrição</label><input id="cD" value="${esc(c.descricao || "")}" />
    <div class="kv" style="margin-top:10px">
      <div style="background:none;border:none;padding:0"><label class="muted">Tipo</label><select id="cT"><option value="produto" ${c.tipo === "produto" ? "selected" : ""}>Produto</option><option value="servico" ${c.tipo === "servico" ? "selected" : ""}>Serviço</option></select></div>
      <div style="background:none;border:none;padding:0"><label class="muted">Linha</label><input id="cL" value="${esc(c.linha || "Hemostasia")}" /></div>
      <div style="background:none;border:none;padding:0"><label class="muted">Ativo</label><select id="cA"><option value="true" ${c.ativo !== false ? "selected" : ""}>Sim</option><option value="false" ${c.ativo === false ? "selected" : ""}>Não</option></select></div>
    </div>
    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px;display:block">Finalidade de uso</label><input id="cF" value="${esc(c.finalidade || "")}" />
    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px;display:block">Termos fortes (decidem o match — separados por vírgula)</label>
    <input id="cTF" value="${esc((c.termos_fortes || []).join(", "))}" placeholder="ex.: tempo de protrombina, ttpa, coagulômetro" />
    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px;display:block">Palavras-chave de apoio (reforçam o score — vírgula)</label>
    <input id="cK" value="${esc((c.palavras_chave || []).join(", "))}" />
    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px;display:block">Sinônimos (vírgula)</label>
    <input id="cS" value="${esc((c.sinonimos || []).join(", "))}" />
    <div style="margin-top:16px;display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end">
      <button class="btn-ghost" id="cCancel">Cancelar</button><button class="btn-pri" id="cSave">Salvar</button></div>
  </div>`);
        $("#cCancel").onclick = closeModal;
        $("#cSave").onclick = async () => {
          const split = (s) =>
            s
              .split(",")
              .map((x) => x.trim())
              .filter(Boolean);
          const { error } = await sb.rpc("nl_admin_upsert_catalogo", {
            p_id: c.id || null,
            p_tipo: $("#cT").value,
            p_linha: $("#cL").value.trim(),
            p_descricao: $("#cD").value.trim(),
            p_finalidade: $("#cF").value.trim(),
            p_palavras_chave: split($("#cK").value),
            p_sinonimos: split($("#cS").value),
            p_termos_fortes: split($("#cTF").value),
            p_marca: null,
            p_ncm: null,
            p_registro_anvisa: null,
            p_ativo: $("#cA").value === "true",
          });
          if (error) {
            toast("Erro: " + error.message, "error");
            return;
          }
          closeModal();
          loadCatalogo();
        };
      }

      /* ---- palavras indesejadas (bloqueio global do match) ---- */

        const { data, error } = await sb.rpc("nl_list_negativos");
        if (error) {
          $("#negTable").innerHTML =
            `<div class="empty">Erro: ${esc(error.message)}</div>`;
          return;
        }
        const rows = (data || [])
          .map(
            (n) => `<tr>
    <td><strong>${esc(n.termo)}</strong></td>
    <td>${esc(n.motivo || "—")}</td>
    <td>${n.ativo ? '<span class="tag sug_a">ativo</span>' : '<span class="tag sug_r">inativo</span>'}</td>
    <td class="row-actions"><button class="btn-no" data-delneg="${esc(n.termo)}">remover</button></td>
  </tr>`,
          )
          .join("");
        $("#negTable").innerHTML = rows
          ? `<table><thead><tr><th>Palavra/expressão</th><th>Motivo</th><th>Status</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>`
          : '<div class="empty">Nenhuma palavra bloqueada.</div>';
        document.querySelectorAll("#negTable [data-delneg]").forEach(

              ) {

      $("#btnAddNeg").addEventListener("click", async () => {

        }

        if (error) {
          toast("Erro: " + error.message, "error");

        $("#negTermo").value = "";
        $("#negMotivo").value = "";

        );
        loadNegativos();
      });
      $("#negTermo").addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
        if (e.key === "Enter") $("#btnAddNeg").click();
      });

      /* ============ DOCUMENTOS (RAG) ============ */
      let docsBusy = false;
      function setDocsBusy(busy) {
        docsBusy = busy;
        ["#btnReindexAll", "#btnUploadDoc", "#btnAddDoc"].forEach((s) => {
          const b = $(s);
          if (b) b.disabled = busy;
        });
        document
          .querySelectorAll("#docTable [data-reindex],#docTable [data-del]")
          .forEach((b) => (b.disabled = busy));
      }
      async function loadDocs() {
        docsBusy = false;
        try {
          const r = await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-rag-docs`);
          const j = await safeJson(r);
          const docs = (j && (j.docs || (Array.isArray(j) ? j : null))) || [];
          const rows = docs
            .map(
              (
                d,
              ) => `<tr><td><strong>${esc(d.title || d.file_id)}</strong><div class="modo">${esc(d.file_id)}</div></td>
      <td>${esc(d.code || "—")}</td><td>${d.chunk_count || 0}</td><td>${fmtDate(d.last_indexed_at)}</td>
      <td class="row-actions"><button class="btn-ghost" data-reindex="${esc(d.file_id)}">reprocessar</button>
      <button class="btn-no" data-del="${esc(d.file_id)}">excluir</button></td></tr>`,
            )
            .join("");
          $("#docTable").innerHTML = rows
            ? `<table><thead><tr><th>Documento</th><th>Código</th><th>Chunks</th><th>Indexado</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>`
            : '<div class="empty">Nenhum documento.</div>';
          document.querySelectorAll("#docTable [data-del]").forEach(
            (b) =>
              (b.onclick = async () => {
                if (
                  await confirmDialog("Excluir este documento do RAG?", {
                    okText: "Excluir",
                  })
                ) {
                  setDocsBusy(true);
                  try {
                    await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-rag-doc-delete`, {
                      method: "POST",
                      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
                      body: JSON.stringify({ file_id: b.dataset.del }),
                    });
                    toast("Documento excluído.", "success");
                  } catch (e) {
                    toast("Erro: " + e.message, "error");
                  }
                  setTimeout(loadDocs, 800);
                }
              }),
          );
          document.querySelectorAll("#docTable [data-reindex]").forEach(
            (b) =>
              (b.onclick = async () => {
                if (docsBusy) return;
                setDocsBusy(true);
                b.textContent = "processando…";
                try {
                  await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-rag-reindex`, {
                    method: "POST",
                    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
                    body: JSON.stringify({ file_id: b.dataset.reindex }),
                  });
                  toast("Reprocessamento disparado.", "success");
                  setTimeout(loadDocs, 2000);
                } catch (e) {
                  toast("Erro: " + e.message, "error");
                  setDocsBusy(false);
                  b.textContent = "reprocessar";
                }
              }),
          );
        } catch (e) {
          $("#docTable").innerHTML =
            `<div class="empty">RAG indisponível: ${esc(e.message)}</div>`;
        }
      }
      /* enviar arquivos reais (upload múltiplo; substitui se mesmo nome) */
      $("#btnUploadDoc").addEventListener("click", () =>
        $("#docFileInput").click(),
      );
      $("#docFileInput").addEventListener("change", async (e) => {
        const files = Array.from(e.target.files || []);
        e.target.value = "";
        if (!files.length) return;
        if (docsBusy) return;
        setDocsBusy(true);
        let ok = 0,
          fail = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
          const file = files[i];
          toast(
            `Enviando ${i + 1}/${files.length}: “${file.name}”…`,
            "info",
          );
          try {
            const fd = new FormData();
            fd.append("data", file, file.name);
            const r = await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-rag-upload`, {
              method: "POST",
              body: fd,
            });
            if (!r.ok) throw new Error("HTTP " + r.status);
            ok++;
          } catch (err) {
            fail++;
            toast(`Erro em “${file.name}”: ${err.message}`, "error");
          }
        }
        toast(
          `Upload concluído: ${ok} indexado(s)${fail ? `, ${fail} falha(s)` : ""}.`,
          fail ? "error" : "success",
        );
        setTimeout(loadDocs, 1500);
      });
      /* reprocessar a pasta inteira do Drive */
      $("#btnReindexAll").addEventListener("click", async () => {
        if (docsBusy) return;
        if (
          !(await confirmDialog(
            "Reprocessar TODA a pasta do Google Drive? Isso pode levar alguns minutos.",
            { okText: "Reprocessar", danger: false },
          ))
        )
          return;
        setDocsBusy(true);
        try {
          await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-rag-reindex`, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: "{}",
          });
          toast("Reprocessamento da pasta disparado.", "success");
          setTimeout(loadDocs, 2500);
        } catch (e) {
          toast("Erro: " + e.message, "error");
          setDocsBusy(false);
        }
      });
      $("#btnAddDoc").addEventListener("click", () => {
        openModal(`<header><strong>Adicionar documento</strong><button class="close">×</button></header><div class="body">
    <label class="muted">ID/código do arquivo</label><input id="dId" placeholder="MANUAL-COAG-01" />
    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px;display:block">Título</label><input id="dTitle" />
    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px;display:block">Conteúdo (texto)</label><textarea id="dText" rows="8" placeholder="Cole aqui o texto do documento..."></textarea>
    <div style="margin-top:16px;display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end">
      <button class="btn-ghost" id="dCancel">Cancelar</button><button class="btn-pri" id="dSave">Indexar</button></div>
  </div>`);
        $("#dCancel").onclick = closeModal;
        $("#dSave").onclick = async () => {
          const file_id = $("#dId").value.trim();
          if (!file_id) {
            toast("Informe o ID");
            return;
          }
          $("#dSave").disabled = true;
          try {
            await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-rag-upsert`, {
              method: "POST",
              headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
              body: JSON.stringify({
                file_id,
                title: $("#dTitle").value.trim() || file_id,
                code: file_id,
                content_text: $("#dText").value,
              }),
            });
            closeModal();
            loadDocs();
            toast("Documento enviado para indexação.");
          } catch (e) {
            toast("Erro: " + e.message, "error");
            $("#dSave").disabled = false;
          }
        };
      });

      /* ============ USUARIOS ============ */
      async function loadUsers() {
        const { data, error } = await sb.rpc("nl_admin_list_users");
        if (error) {
          $("#userTable").innerHTML =
            `<div class="empty">Erro: ${esc(error.message)}</div>`;
          return;
        }
        const rows = (data || [])
          .map(
            (
              u,
            ) => `<tr><td>${esc(u.full_name || "—")}</td><td>${esc(u.email)}</td>
    <td>${u.role === "admin" ? '<span class="tag sug_a">Admin</span>' : '<span class="tag">Visualização</span>'}</td>
    <td>${fmtDate(u.created_at)}</td>
    <td class="row-actions">
      <button class="btn-ghost" data-edit='${esc(JSON.stringify(u))}'>perfil</button>
      ${u.user_id !== ME.id ? `<button class="btn-no" data-del="${u.user_id}">excluir</button>` : ""}
    </td></tr>`,
          )
          .join("");
        $("#userTable").innerHTML =
          `<table><thead><tr><th>Nome</th><th>E-mail</th><th>Perfil</th><th>Criado</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>`;
        document.querySelectorAll("#userTable [data-del]").forEach(
          (b) =>
            (b.onclick = async () => {
              if (
                await confirmDialog("Excluir este usuário?", {
                  okText: "Excluir",
                })
              ) {
                const { error } = await sb.rpc("nl_admin_delete_user", {
                  p_user_id: b.dataset.del,
                });
                if (error) {
                  toast(error.message, "error");
                } else {
                  toast("Usuário excluído.", "success");
                }
                loadUsers();
              }
            }),
        );
        document
          .querySelectorAll("#userTable [data-edit]")
          .forEach(
            (b) => (b.onclick = () => openUserEdit(JSON.parse(b.dataset.edit))),
          );
      }
      function openUserEdit(u) {
        openModal(`<header><strong>Perfil de ${esc(u.email)}</strong><button class="close">×</button></header><div class="body">
    <label class="muted">Nome</label><input id="uName" value="${esc(u.full_name || "")}" />
    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px;display:block">Perfil</label>
    <select id="uRole"><option value="visualizacao" ${u.role !== "admin" ? "selected" : ""}>Visualização</option><option value="admin" ${u.role === "admin" ? "selected" : ""}>Admin</option></select>
    <div style="margin-top:16px;display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end"><button class="btn-ghost" id="uCancel">Cancelar</button><button class="btn-pri" id="uSave">Salvar</button></div>
  </div>`);
        $("#uCancel").onclick = closeModal;
        $("#uSave").onclick = async () => {
          const { error } = await sb.rpc("nl_admin_update_user", {
            p_user_id: u.user_id,
            p_full_name: $("#uName").value.trim(),
            p_role: $("#uRole").value,
          });
          if (error) {
            toast(error.message, "error");
            return;
          }
          closeModal();
          loadUsers();
        };
      }
      $("#btnAddUser").addEventListener("click", () => {
        openModal(`<header><strong>Adicionar usuário</strong><button class="close">×</button></header><div class="body">
    <label class="muted">Nome</label><input id="nName" />
    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px;display:block">E-mail</label><input id="nEmail" type="email" />
    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px;display:block">Senha</label><input id="nPass" type="text" value="@Nldiag2024" />
    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px;display:block">Perfil</label>
    <select id="nRole"><option value="visualizacao">Visualização</option><option value="admin">Admin</option></select>
    <div style="margin-top:16px;display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end"><button class="btn-ghost" id="nCancel">Cancelar</button><button class="btn-pri" id="nSave">Criar</button></div>
  </div>`);
        $("#nCancel").onclick = closeModal;
        $("#nSave").onclick = async () => {
          const email = $("#nEmail").value.trim(),
            pass = $("#nPass").value,
            name = $("#nName").value.trim(),
            role = $("#nRole").value;
          if (!email || !pass) {
            toast("Preencha e-mail e senha");
            return;
          }
          $("#nSave").disabled = true;
          // cliente temporário para não derrubar a sessão do admin
          const tmp = supabase.createClient(
            CONFIG.SUPABASE_URL,
            CONFIG.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY,
            {
              auth: {
                storageKey: "nldiag-tmp",
                persistSession: false,
                lock: async (_n, _t, fn) => fn(),
              },
            },
          );
          const { data, error } = await tmp.auth.signUp({
            email,
            password: pass,
            options: { data: { full_name: name, company_name: COMPANY, role } },
          });
          if (error) {
            toast("Erro: " + error.message, "error");
            $("#nSave").disabled = false;
            return;
          }
          const uid = data.user?.id;
          if (uid) {
            await sb.rpc("nl_admin_confirm_user", { p_user_id: uid });
            await sb.rpc("nl_admin_update_user", {
              p_user_id: uid,
              p_full_name: name,
              p_role: role,
            });
          }
          await tmp.auth.signOut();
          closeModal();
          loadUsers();
          toast("Usuário criado.");
        };
      });

      /* ============ CHAT (widget flutuante) ============ */
      const VIEW_LABELS = {
        editais: "Buscar editais",
        gestao: "Gerenciar editais",
        catalogo: "Catálogo",
        documentos: "Documentos",
        usuarios: "Usuários",
      };
      function pageContextLabel() {
        return VIEW_LABELS[currentView] || "Buscar editais";
      }
      // ações rápidas por página (texto enviado ao agente quando clicado)
      const QUICK_ACTIONS = {
        editais: [
          [
            "list",
            "Listar editais novos",
            "Liste os editais novos para eu analisar.",
          ],
          [
            "sparkles",
            "Sugeridos para aceitar",
            "Quais editais estão sugeridos para aceitar e por quê?",
          ],
          [
            "help-circle",
            "Esse edital faz sentido?",
            "Me ajude a avaliar se vale a pena participar dos editais em aberto.",
          ],
        ],
        gestao: [
          [
            "gavel",
            "O que está em disputa?",
            'Quais editais aceitos estão na etapa "em disputa"?',
          ],
          [
            "alarm-clock",
            "O que está atrasado?",
            "Quais editais aceitos estão com prazo de proposta vencido ou próximo?",
          ],
          [
            "bar-chart-3",
            "Resumo do funil",
            "Me dê um resumo de quantos editais estão em cada etapa do funil.",
          ],
        ],
        catalogo: [
          [
            "package",
            "Ver catálogo",
            "Liste os produtos e serviços ativos do catálogo.",
          ],
        ],
        documentos: [
          [
            "folder-open",
            "Sobre os documentos",
            "O que há na base de conhecimento que posso consultar?",
          ],
        ],
        usuarios: [
          ["list", "Editais novos", "Liste os editais novos para eu analisar."],
        ],
      };
      function chatEmptyHtml() {
        const acts = QUICK_ACTIONS[currentView] || QUICK_ACTIONS.editais;
        const intro =
          currentView === "gestao"
            ? "Acompanhe os editais aceitos. Peça para mover de etapa, definir responsável ou prazo."
            : "Pergunte sobre editais, peça análises, consulte bulas e documentos ou registre decisões.";
        const nome = (ME && (ME.full_name || "").split(" ")[0]) || "";
        const btns = acts
          .map(
            (a, i) =>
              `<button class="qa-btn" data-qa="${i}"><i data-lucide="${a[0]}"></i><span>${esc(a[1])}</span></button>`,
          )
          .join("");
        return `<div class="cp-welcome">
      <div class="cp-avatar"><i data-lucide="bot"></i></div>
      <h4>Olá${nome ? ", " + esc(nome) : ""}! 👋</h4>
      <p>${esc(intro)}</p>
    <div class="cp-quick"><div class="qa-title">Ações rápidas · ${esc(pageContextLabel())}</div>${btns}</div></div>`;
      }
      function renderChatEmpty() {
        $("#msgs").innerHTML = chatEmptyHtml();
        if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
        const acts = QUICK_ACTIONS[currentView] || QUICK_ACTIONS.editais;
        document.querySelectorAll("#msgs .qa-btn").forEach(
          (b) =>
            (b.onclick = () => {
              const a = acts[Number(b.dataset.qa)];
              if (!a) return;
              $("#chatInput").value = a[2];
              sendChat();
            }),
        );
      }
      function openChat() {
        $("#chatPanel").classList.remove("hidden");
        $("#chatFab").classList.add("hidden");
        if ($("#chatCtx")) $("#chatCtx").textContent = pageContextLabel();
        if (!$("#msgs").querySelector(".msg")) renderChatEmpty();
        if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
        if (!curSession) loadSessions();
        setTimeout(() => {
          const i = $("#chatInput");
          if (i) i.focus();
          $("#msgs").scrollTop = $("#msgs").scrollHeight;
        }, 50);
      }
      function closeChat() {
        $("#chatPanel").classList.add("hidden");
        $("#chatFab").classList.remove("hidden");
      }
      function toggleExpandChat() {
        const p = $("#chatPanel");
        const exp = p.classList.toggle("expanded");
        const btn = $("#chatExpand");
        if (btn) {
          btn.title = exp ? "Recolher" : "Expandir";
          btn.innerHTML = `<i data-lucide="${exp ? "minimize-2" : "maximize-2"}"></i>`;
        }
        if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
        $("#msgs").scrollTop = $("#msgs").scrollHeight;
      }
      $("#chatFab").addEventListener("click", openChat);
      $("#chatClose").addEventListener("click", closeChat);
      $("#chatExpand").addEventListener("click", toggleExpandChat);
      $("#chatHistoryBtn").addEventListener("click", () => {
        const s = $("#chatSessions");
        s.classList.toggle("hidden");
        if (!s.classList.contains("hidden")) loadSessions();
      });

      async function loadSessions() {
        if (!ME) return;
        try {
          const r = await fetch(
            `${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-sessions?userId=${encodeURIComponent(ME.id)}`,
          );
          const arr = await safeJson(r);
          const list = Array.isArray(arr) ? arr : [];
          $("#sessionList").innerHTML =
            list
              .map(
                (s) =>
                  `<div class="s${s.session_id === curSession ? " active" : ""}" data-s="${esc(s.session_id)}"><span class="s-title">${esc((stripCtx(s.titulo) || "Conversa").slice(0, 48))}</span><button class="s-del" data-del="${esc(s.session_id)}" title="Excluir conversa"><i data-lucide="trash-2"></i></button></div>`,
              )
              .join("") ||
            '<div class="muted" style="padding:8px">Sem conversas</div>';
          if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
          document.querySelectorAll("#sessionList .s").forEach(
            (d) =>
              (d.onclick = (ev) => {
                if (ev.target.closest(".s-del")) return;
                openSession(d.dataset.s);
                $("#chatSessions").classList.add("hidden");
              }),
          );
          document.querySelectorAll("#sessionList .s-del").forEach(
            (b) =>
              (b.onclick = async (ev) => {
                ev.stopPropagation();
                if (
                  !(await confirmDialog("Excluir esta conversa?", {
                    okText: "Excluir",
                    danger: true,
                  }))
                )
                  return;
                try {
                  await fetch(
                    `${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-session?sessionId=${encodeURIComponent(b.dataset.del)}&userId=${encodeURIComponent(ME.id)}`,
                    { method: "DELETE" },
                  );
                  if (b.dataset.del === curSession) {
                    curSession = newSessionId();
                    renderChatEmpty();
                  }
                  loadSessions();
                } catch (e2) {
                  toast("Erro ao excluir: " + e2.message, "error");
                }
              }),
          );
        } catch (e) {
          $("#sessionList").innerHTML =
            `<div class="muted" style="padding:8px">Indisponível</div>`;
        }
      }
      function newSessionId() {
        return (
          "sess-" + Date.now() + "-" + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)
        );
      }
      $("#newChat").addEventListener("click", () => {
        curSession = newSessionId();
        renderChatEmpty();
        $("#chatSessions").classList.add("hidden");
        loadSessions();
      });
      async function openSession(id) {
        curSession = id;
        loadSessions();
        try {
          const r = await fetch(
            `${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-history?sessionId=${encodeURIComponent(id)}&userId=${encodeURIComponent(ME.id)}`,
          );
          const arr = await safeJson(r);
          const msgs = (Array.isArray(arr) ? arr : [])
            .map((m) => m.message)
            .filter(Boolean);
          $("#msgs").innerHTML =
            msgs
              .map((m) => {
                const type = m.type === "human" ? "u" : "a";
                const c = stripCtx(m.content);
                return `<div class="msg ${type}">${type === "a" ? mdRender(c) : esc(c)}</div>`;
              })
              .join("") || '<div class="empty">Conversa vazia.</div>';
          addCopyButtons();
          $("#msgs").scrollTop = $("#msgs").scrollHeight;
        } catch (e) {
          /* noop */
        }
      }
      /* botão "copiar" nas respostas do assistente */
      function addCopyButtons() {
        document.querySelectorAll("#msgs .msg.a").forEach((m) => {
          if (m.querySelector(".msg-copy") || m.querySelector(".typing"))
            return;
          const b = el("button", "msg-copy", '<i data-lucide="copy"></i>');
          b.title = "Copiar resposta";
          b.onclick = async (ev) => {
            ev.stopPropagation();
            try {
              await navigator.clipboard.writeText(m.innerText);
              b.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="check"></i>';
            } catch (e) {
              const ta = document.createElement("textarea");
              ta.value = m.innerText;
              document.body.appendChild(ta);
              ta.select();
              document.execCommand("copy");
              ta.remove();
              b.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="check"></i>';
            }
            if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
            setTimeout(() => {
              b.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="copy"></i>';
              if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
            }, 1400);
          };
          m.appendChild(b);
        });
        if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
      }
      // recarrega a tela atual para o usuário VER as ações que o agente executou
      function refreshCurrentView() {
        if (currentView === "editais") {
          loadStats();
          loadEditais();
        } else if (currentView === "gestao") {
          loadBoard();
        }
      }
      async function sendChat() {
        const txt = $("#chatInput").value.trim();
        if (!txt || $("#sendChat").disabled) return;
        if (!curSession) curSession = newSessionId();
        if ($("#msgs").querySelector(".empty, .cp-welcome"))
          $("#msgs").innerHTML = "";
        $("#msgs").appendChild(el("div", "msg u", esc(txt)));
        $("#chatInput").value = "";
        $("#chatInput").style.height = "44px";
        $("#msgs").scrollTop = $("#msgs").scrollHeight;
        const thinking = el(
          "div",
          "msg a",
          '<span class="typing"><i></i><i></i><i></i></span>',
        );
        $("#msgs").appendChild(thinking);
        $("#msgs").scrollTop = $("#msgs").scrollHeight;
        const sendBtn = $("#sendChat");
        sendBtn.disabled = true;
        // contexto da página: vai num campo separado e também prefixado (compat. com o agente).
        // O título/histórico são limpos no display por stripCtx().
        const ctx = pageContextLabel();
        try {
          const r = await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-AgentRag`, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: JSON.stringify({
              sessionId: curSession,
              userId: ME.id,
              userName: ME.full_name,
              message: `[PÁGINA: ${ctx}] ${txt}`,
              pageContext: ctx,
            }),
          });
          const j = await safeJson(r);
          thinking.innerHTML = mdRender((j && j.output) || "(sem resposta)");
          refreshCurrentView();
        } catch (e) {
          thinking.className = "msg err";
          thinking.innerHTML =
            "⚠️ Não consegui responder agora (" +
            esc(e.message) +
            "). Tente novamente.";
        } finally {
          sendBtn.disabled = false;
          if (window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
        }
        addCopyButtons();
        $("#msgs").scrollTop = $("#msgs").scrollHeight;
        const i = $("#chatInput");
        if (i) i.focus();
        loadSessions();
      }
      function autoGrowChatInput() {
        const i = $("#chatInput");
        i.style.height = "auto";
        i.style.height = Math.min(i.scrollHeight, 140) + "px";
      }
      $("#sendChat").addEventListener("click", sendChat);
      $("#chatInput").addEventListener("input", autoGrowChatInput);
      $("#chatInput").addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
        if (e.key === "Enter" && !e.shiftKey) {
          e.preventDefault();
          sendChat();
        }
      });
      /* anexar arquivo À CONVERSA atual (indexado só nesta sessão) */
      $("#chatAttach").addEventListener("click", () => {
        if (!curSession) curSession = newSessionId();
        $("#chatFileInput").click();
      });
      $("#chatFileInput").addEventListener("change", async (e) => {
        const file = e.target.files[0];
        e.target.value = "";
        if (!file) return;
        if (!curSession) curSession = newSessionId();
        if ($("#msgs").querySelector(".empty, .cp-welcome"))
          $("#msgs").innerHTML = "";
        const note = el(
          "div",
          "msg a",
          `📎 Indexando "${esc(file.name)}" nesta conversa…`,
        );
        $("#msgs").appendChild(note);
        $("#msgs").scrollTop = $("#msgs").scrollHeight;
        try {
          const fd = new FormData();
          fd.append("data", file, file.name);
          fd.append("session_id", curSession);
          const r = await fetch(
            `${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-rag-upload?sessionId=${encodeURIComponent(curSession)}`,
            { method: "POST", body: fd },
          );
          if (!r.ok) throw new Error("HTTP " + r.status);
          note.innerHTML = `📎 Arquivo "${esc(file.name)}" indexado nesta conversa. Já posso responder sobre ele.`;
        } catch (err) {
          note.innerHTML = "Erro ao anexar: " + esc(err.message);
        }
        $("#msgs").scrollTop = $("#msgs").scrollHeight;
      });

      /* ============ modal + toast ============ */
      function openModal(html) {
        const r = $("#modalRoot");
        r.innerHTML = `<div class="modal-bg"><div class="modal">${html}</div></div>`;
        r.querySelector(".modal-bg").onclick = (e) => {
          if (e.target.classList.contains("modal-bg")) closeModal();
        };
        const c = r.querySelector(".close");
        if (c) c.onclick = closeModal;
      }
      function closeModal() {
        $("#modalRoot").innerHTML = "";
      }
      function toast(msg, type) {
        type = type || "info";
        const icon = type === "success" ? "✓" : type === "error" ? "!" : "i";
        const t = el(
          "div",
          "toast " + type,
          `<span class="ti">${icon}</span><span class="tx">${esc(msg)}</span>`,
        );
        $("#toastRoot").appendChild(t);
        requestAnimationFrame(() => t.classList.add("show"));
        setTimeout(() => {
          t.classList.remove("show");
          setTimeout(() => t.remove(), 300);
        }, 3500);
      }
      /* diálogo de confirmação in-app (substitui confirm() do navegador) */
      function confirmDialog(message, opts) {
        opts = opts || {};
        const okText = opts.okText || "Confirmar";
        const cancelText = opts.cancelText || "Cancelar";
        const danger = opts.danger !== false; // padrão: ação destrutiva
        return new Promise((resolve) => {
          openModal(`<div class="body">
      <div class="confirm-ico ${danger ? "danger" : "ask"}">${danger ? "⚠" : "?"}</div>
      <div class="confirm-msg">${esc(message)}</div>
      ${opts.extraHtml || ""}
      <div class="confirm-actions">
        <button class="btn-ghost" id="cfNo">${esc(cancelText)}</button>
        <button class="${danger ? "btn-no" : "btn-pri"}" id="cfYes">${esc(okText)}</button>
      </div>
    </div>`);
          $("#modalRoot .modal").classList.add("confirm");
          let done = false;
          const finish = (v) => {
            if (done) return;
            done = true;
            closeModal();
            resolve(v);
          };
          $("#cfYes").onclick = () => {
            if (opts.onConfirm) opts.onConfirm();
            finish(true);
          };
          $("#cfNo").onclick = () => finish(false);
          const bg = $("#modalRoot .modal-bg");
          if (bg)
            bg.onclick = (e) => {
              if (e.target.classList.contains("modal-bg")) finish(false);
            };
        });
      }
    </script>
  </body>
</html>
